d: Beiman is a Bengali movie starring Ritika Sen and Zunaid Khan in prominent roles. It is directed by Jamaluddin.
Daaku Maharaaj is a Telugu movie starring Nandamuri Balakrishna, Urvashi Rautela, Bobby Deol and Shraddha Srinath in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Bobby Kolli.
Jhumur is a Bengali movie directed by Barun Das. Featuring Rajasree Rajbanshi in the lead role.

Ram, a private detective, learns about murders in the city before the police do. Tasked with solving a murder case in 15 days, Ram also grapples with missing his girlfriend, Jaanu, who becomes unexpectedly linked to the case. Will Ram solve the mystery, and will Jaanu play a pivotal role in it?

In 1920s India, Govind, a young stable boy, forms a deep bond with a spirited horse named Azaad. As their journey unfolds amidst rebellion and oppression, Govind`s dream of riding Azaad becomes a quest for courage, awakening him to his own strength in the fight for India`s freedom.
Mein Maike Chali Jaungi is a Bhojpuri film directed by Ishtiyaque Shaikh Bunty. The film features Dinesh Lal Yadav and Amrapali Dubey in the lead roles.

Sky Force unravels a gripping story inspired by extraordinary true events surrounding one of the deadliest airstrikes between India and Pakistan. This epic tale of bravery and sacrifice follows the mystery of a hero lost in action and a comrade`s relentless quest for the truth. Packed with emotion, camaraderie, and high-stakes action, Sky Force is a soaring tribute to courage and resilience!
Daaku Maharaaj is a Hindi movie starring Nandamuri Balakrishna, Urvashi Rautela, Bobby Deol and Shraddha Srinath in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Bobby Kolli.
To save their job and get their life back, two goofy police officers must spend a night at a haunted mansion.

Thaballeima, a simple village girl, marries Babuchouba, a city-based government employee. When he is transferred and drawn to a divorcee, she faces heartbreak but chooses love over confrontation, ultimately winning him back with her unwavering devotion.

Bhagiratha follows the inspiring journey of Suryaprakash, a selfless civil engineer. When he joins forces with a fearless journalist, their love story turns into a fight for justice against a ruthless gang. As they strive to protect the poor, they must confront the hidden evils standing in their way. Will their mission triumph over corruption?

After Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj`s death, the Mughals aim to expand into the Deccan, only to face his fearless son, Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj. Chhaava, inspired by Shivaji Sawant`s novel, chronicles Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj`s unwavering resistance against Aurangzeb, marked by courage, strategy, and betrayal.
It is a sequel to Marvel Studios "The Falcon and the Winter Soldier" and follows Sam Wilson as the new Captain America.
The House of Dead (7D) is an English, 7D virtual reality show that will take you on the adventure of a lifetime! Get ready to leave reality behind and dive into an exciting and thrilling journey.

Kuch Sapney Apne is a heartwarming film exploring relationships, both queer and conventional, as Kartik and Aman face a test of love after a fling leads to a domestic conflict, while Kartik`s parents, Damodar and Vasudha, also struggle with their differences. Will these couples overcome their challenges and stand the test of time? The film delicately examines how uncomfortable truths can shake relationships, but also bring growth and healing.

Set in a picturesque village of the 1990s, this timeless tale follows two lovers from different castes who defy societal norms. As they struggle against tradition and prejudice, their love is put to the ultimate test. Will they stand together or succumb to fate? A story of resilience, destiny, and the enduring power of love.

Rooban, a ghost investigator, acts as a communication medium for the dead souls to fulfil their wishes and attain salvation. What if he is unable to unravel the mystery surrounding a particular soul which is creating havoc?

A Brahmarakshasa demon, captured and sealed in a box, accidentally ends up in a police station`s evidence room. When it`s chaos erupts and a suspended cop Sathya is left alone to face the Brahmarakshasa. As he battles the unleashed demon he must survive its wrath and uncover the conspiracy against him. With the demon`s power growing stronger, Sathya`s dark past surfaces. Will he tame the evil within and outside?

t: ICC Mens Champions Trophy 2025 Finals (IND Vs NZ)
d: Book your tickets for a special screening of ICC Men`s Champions Trophy 2025 Final: India vs New Zealand!
A son must defend his father in court after a bribery accusation, forcing them to confront their strained relationship while fighting for justice in this legal drama.

Disney`s Snow White is a live-action musical reimagining of the classic 1937 film. The magical music adventure journeys back to the timeless story with beloved characters Bashful, Doc, Dopey, Grumpy, Happy, Sleepy, and Sneezy.

When several Sindhi children are kidnapped and the police fail to crack the case, hope seems lost. At the same time, a cultural program at a Sindhi school instills confidence and courage in its students. United and determined, the children take a bold step, risking their lives to rescue the kidnapped kids themselves.

O Andala Rakshasi follows the life of Aadi, a charismatic yet unscrupulous man who has mastered the art of deception. A smooth talker, Aadi preys on the emotions of unsuspecting women, using them for his selfish gains before cruelly discarding them.

After 12 years of separation, Tara and Kishore are unexpectedly reunited when they learn that their daughter plans to marry without informing them. Determined to stop her, they set off on a journey to Nainital, where old emotions resurface, leading to unexpected twists in their fractured relationship.
Hungamaa.com is a Bengali movie starring Srabanti Chatterjee and Bonny Sengupta in prominent roles.

In 1966, a deadly cattle disease threatens India's food supply, leaving scientists baffled. When renowned scientist Susurathanandan's research fails, he turns to the mystical Himalayas, seeking Rudraksha Digambara Swamy, believing nature holds the cure in this gripping tale of science, faith, and survival.
Jack is a Telugu movie directed by Bommarillu Baskar, starring Siddhu Jonnalagadda and Vaishnavi Chaitanya in lead roles.

After spending 17 years in prison to secure a peaceful life for his family, AK emerges to find his son falsely accused of heinous crimes. To clear his son`s name, he must return to the ruthless world he once left behind, confronting dangerous enemies and the haunting shadows of his past.
Jaat is a massive action drama directed by Gopichand Malineni. The film stars Sunny Deol in the crucial role alongside Randeep Hooda, Vineet Kumar, Regina Cassandra, and Saiyami Kher.

Paddington returns to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, who now resides at the Home for Retired Bears. With the Brown family in town, a thrilling adventure ensues when a mystery plunges them into an unexpected journey.
Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, the twin brothers return to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.
Mummy Dragon is a multilingual movie starring Narisu Bai, Liu Chu Xuan and Zhang Xiao Jun in prominent roles. It is directed by Shuai Yang.

A fun-loving trio of fake ghost hunters find themselves caught in a deadly feud between a shady broker and the owner of a haunted mansion on the city`s outskirts. As they step into the eerie property, they must face not only a vengeful gang of ghosts inside but also a ruthless mob of thugs waiting outside, forcing them to risk their lives in a battle against both supernatural and real-world dangers.

In the scenic village of Dasarahalli, while children study hard and housewives struggle to support their families, many men waste their lives in alcohol. Despite advice from Gandhian elders, they refuse to change. When kids plan theft for exam fees and women reach a breaking point, the elders devise a clever plan-mixing a doctor-recommended remedy into a village feast. The men lose their taste for alcohol, start working, and slowly rebuild their families. Dasarahalli unites to shut all liquor shops, marking a new beginning. Childhood friends Tejas and Kumar witness the village`s powerful transformation.

A powerful biographical drama that chronicles the inspiring journey of Jyotirao and Savitribai Phule, visionary social reformers who ignited a revolution in education and equality in 19th-century India.

Supriya Pathak Kapur helms a titular role in a comic tale of 65-year-old Jasuben, who teams up with fellow homemakers to claim their financial independence, proving, as she says, "Why should boys have all the funds?"

A ghostly presence haunting St. Vincent`s College comes to life every Valentine`s Day at the Virgin Tree, transforming a symbol of longing into a place of fear, and drives a veteran para-physicist to uncover its dark truth.
Thunderbolts* are the *New Avengers who mix grit with wit as they bring a new hope to the world.

A fiery Income Tax officer, Amay Patnaik, confronts the corrupt nexus in Bhoj. Beneath the veneer of honesty lies a sinister operation tied to Dada Bhai, a revered politician. As Amay unravels layers of deceit buried in fields and fortresses, one question looms: will justice prevail, or will power silence the truth?
Guiyan 2 is a Chattisgarhi movie starring Amlesh Nagesh, Dilesh Sahu and Anikriti Chauhan in prominent roles. It is directed by Amlesh Nagesh and Rajat Singh Rajput.

t: L-Jagadamma Ezhaam Class - B State First
d: L-Jagadamma Ezhaam Class - B State First is a powerful and heartwarming story of resilience, justice, and the enduring strength of a leader who overcomes deceit and adversity to unite her community and bring lasting progress.

A government scheme turns the life of an 80-year-old lady upside down, presenting her with four outrageous choices: seek revenge on her sons and their wives, rekindle a long-lost love, embrace a swanky lifestyle, or go full thug life with all of the above. Jai Mata Ji Let`s Rock is a Gujarati comedy brimming with laughter, emotions, and surprises. Centered around a quirky family, it`s a fun-filled ride you won`t want to miss!

Aditya, a 32-year-old engineer, faces abuse and injustice at work, where corrupt superiors push him to compromise his morals. Refusing to be part of unconstitutional acts, Aditya stands firm even when promised rewards by a powerful minister. Threatened and anxious about his future, he dreams of Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar, who inspires him to fight for equality and justice. Witnessing the harsh realities of slums and social inequality, Aditya is determined to expose corruption and fight for the constitutional rights of every citizen. His movement gained national attention, and despite the minister`s efforts to stop him, justice and the people secured victory.
Follow the friendship between the Nohara family`s pet dog Shiro and a "small dinosaur." Their connection helps the growth of Shin Chan and the Kasukabe Guard.
Yauwan is a Hindi movie starring Aditya Om and Monalisa. It is directed by P. Vijay Varma.
Mor Chhainha Bhuinya 3 is a Chattisgarhi movie starring Mann Qureshi, Deepak Sahu, Elsa Ghosh and Lakshit Jhanjhi in prominent roles. It is directed by Satish Jain.
Inspired by real-life tragedies, 23 (Iravai Moodu) delves into the dark underbelly of societal violence, examining the devastating impact of massacres, bomb blasts, and unchecked brutality.

Two glamorous thieves flee to Goa after robbing a wealthy businessman, planning to vanish with the stolen fortune. But when they pick up a mysterious stranger who knows one of them, their journey spirals into a twisted game of deception and danger, with secrets that go far beyond the heist.

Sarla, a determined young woman with the dreams of becoming an IAS officer, is deceived by her husband, who promises to support her education after marriage. Faced with humiliation and abuse, she tries to save the marriage but ultimately chooses self respect over compromise....It`s a powerful and eye opening story that challenges male dominance and inspires change.
Hok Reyak Ladhai is a Santali movie starring Paritosh Soren and Urmila Marandi in prominent roles. It is directed by Dashrath Hansdah
Akamozhi Vizhikal is a Tamil movie starring Adam Hassan, Neha Rathnakaran, Dharmajan Bolgatty, Pashanam Shaji and Nirmal Palazhi in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Saseendra K Sankar.
His Story of Itihaas is a true story about the fight of a physics teacher who stands up to question the wrong/distorted history told to us for generations in schools.

Amal`s story, A Wonder Boy, whisks the audience back to their childhood, where the small window of his home transforms into a portal of imagination, enabling him to soar into the vast sky and escape the confines of his world.

Blast off with JetCat, a jet-powered cat that zooms through the skies, flying above the traffic-jammed streets below. Navigate the clouds, avoid obstacles and enjoy a thrilling aerial journey in this fast-paced adventure!

India`s Biggest Franchise is back with the 5th instalment, and this time it is not just chaos and comedy.... But a KILLER Comedy with two different climaxes. Which one will you choose - Housefull 5A or Housefull 5B?

Join Glacia, a brave young iceberg, on a heart-pounding mission to save her melting world. Navigate frozen oceans, unlock ancient mysteries, and battle the forces of heat and time -- all in immersive 7D.

An epic climate quest for all ages!
A life-affirming, genre-bending story based on Stephen King's novella about three chapters in the life of an ordinary man named Charles Krantz.

Maadeva follows the journey of a stoic, emotionless man living in a village who unexpectedly falls in love with Parvathi, a woman from the same village. Through love, Maadeva begins to understand human connections and the importance of emotions, transforming his outlook on life. However, just as he starts embracing life and the people around him, he encounters unforeseen conflicts with a rival family. Will Maadeva navigate these challenges and emerge unscathed?

On the rugged isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies centuries of tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccup`s friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future. Together, they must navigate the delicate path toward peace, soaring beyond the boundaries of their worlds and redefining what it means to be a hero and a leader.

Sitaare Zameen Par is an entertaining and heartwarming film filled with joy, laughter, and happiness. It follows Gulshan, a smug basketball coach sentenced to community service after a drunk driving incident. Assigned to train a team of Neurodivergent adults, he starts off with prejudice and condescension-only to discover that they`re the ones teaching him how to truly live.

A group of survivors of the rage virus lives on a small island. When one of the group leaves the island on a mission into the mainland, he discovers secrets, wonders, and horrors that have mutated not only the infected but other survivors.

A DYSPs sudden death appears to be suicide, but soon raises suspicions of murder. As IPS officer Lal Mohan dives into the investigation, the case takes unexpected turns, uncovering deeper mysteries. Was it truly suicide or a cleverly planned murder?

When a young boy is mistaken for Earth`s ambassador by aliens, he`s thrown into a wild, emotional, and hilarious space adventure. From the makers of Toy Story and Inside Out, Elio is Disney Pixar`s latest heartwarming tale about finding where you truly belong.
The story of a mother who becomes Kali to end a demonic curse rooted in fear, blood, and betrayal.
"Nafratein" depicts the story of Karan, a young rebel, torn between rage and love, as he battles the turmoil within and the world around him.
The movie depicts the folk tale of Kannappa, an atheist hunter who became a devotee of Lord Shiva and plucked out his eyes in an act of devotion.

The life journey of Prabhu and his family - their dream to buy a home in the city, their efforts against multiple obstacles, fight against failures, heartbreaks, and whether they are able to achieve their dream or not.

In a college divided by rivalry between science and arts students, jealousy consumes Adi, leading to betrayal, murder, and irreversible loss. Years later, a grandfather shares this haunting tale with his grandson, hoping to instill the value of forgiveness and redemption before history repeats itself.

Five years after the events of Jurassic World Dominion, the planets ecology has proven largely inhospitable to dinosaurs. Those remaining exist in isolated equatorial environments with climates resembling the one in which they once thrived. The three most colossal creatures within that tropical biosphere hold the key to a drug that will bring miraculous life-saving benefits to humankind.

Academy Award nominee Johansson plays skilled covert operations expert Zora Bennett, contracted to lead a skilled team on a top-secret mission to secure genetic material from the worlds three most massive dinosaurs. When Zoras operation intersects with a civilian family whose boating expedition was capsized by marauding aquatic dinos, they all find themselves stranded on an island where they come face-to-face with a sinister, shocking discovery thats been hidden from the world for decades.

For ENGENEs, this is the opportunity to relive ENHYPEN's incredible world tour FATE. Since their powerful debut, ENHYPEN has captured hearts with their music and flawless choreography. The FATE tour included performances at stadiums and arenas around the world, highlighting their rapid rise in the K-pop scene. Don't miss this chance to see ENHYPEN on the big screen, recreating the intensity of their world tour.
Vahali is a Gujarati movie starring Bhavin Bhanushali, Mazel Vyas, Sachin Parikh and Krunal Pandit in prominent roles. It is directed by Eventus India Entertainment.

t: Runseokjin Ep.Tour In Japan: Live Viewing
d: Starting in Goyang, and continuing through Japan, North America and Europe, Jin embarks on a journey to connect with his beloved ARMY through his very first solo fan concert tour. On July 12, enjoy Jin's one-of-a-kind music and performances from Kyocera Dom Osaka, featuring his second solo album, "Echo," as well as his first solo album, "Happy," broadcast live on the big screen!

t: JSK - Janaki V vs State of Kerala
d:
Janaki, an IT professional from Bangalore, returns to her hometown in Kerala for a quiet vacation. But her peace is shattered when she becomes the victim of a horrific incident. As she begins her fight for justice, the case takes an unexpected turn with the entry of Advocate David Abel Donovan.

Will Janakis pursuit of justice succeed? Or will the system test her strength and resolve?
An intense love story that will break your heart and heal it, too.

In a world that saw her through a different lens, she kept shining with a light that could not be unseen. Her smile awakens hope, her heart builds courage, and her journey inspires us all. And now, she is here to meet you all. She is Tanvi: The Great.
In a quiet village, a boy`s innocent crush unleashes strange events that have everyone convinced he`s brought a ghost along with his feelings.

Thalaivan Thalaivii is a rugged love story that explores the fiery dynamics between a strong-willed couple. As their relationship unfolds, love, conflict, and chaos blend into a powerful emotional journey.
A social comedy of two queens under one roof-a feisty working mom balancing family & career and her sharp-witted house help who keeps her home running.

The Bad Guys are struggling to find trust and acceptance in their newly minted lives as Good Guys when they are pulled out of retirement and forced to do "one last job" by an all-female squad of criminals.
A social comedy of two queens under one roof-a feisty working mom balancing family & career and her sharp-witted house help who keeps her home running.
Rajakanyaka is the story of the village Samudragiri, which is full of Legends and miraculous events. It is about finding a very precious crown and the coronation of Mother Mary with it.

When Neelesh, an idealistic law student from a marginalised section of society, steps into an prestigious institution, he is thrust into a world that doesn`t reflect his own. His friendship with Vidhi, offers hope-until a wave of tragedy exposes the deep-rooted hierarchies he tried to outrun. He must confront the invisible forces that shape who we are allowed to become and who we love. A searing romantic drama about identity, power, and the cost of love in the world we live in.
When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

Khalid, a 5th-grade student, is constantly teased by his classmates, who mockingly call him Afzal Khan. This leaves him feeling isolated and confused. Why do they call me Afzal Khan? Is it because I am a Muslim? he wonders. Was every Muslim an enemy of Shivaji Maharaj like Afzal Khan? Countless questions swirl in Khalid's young mind as, with innocent eyes, he begins searching for the real Shivaji Maharaj. Will he find his answer?

Dhumketu is a gripping tale of love, loss, and the scars of war and extremism. Bhanu and Rupa navigate the unspoken bonds of love and family that are somehow trying to survive, even in the face of destruction.
Two seemingly ordinary women dominate Punjabs kitty parties with uncanny luck until a police investigation reveals layers of deception, desperation, and a far bigger game at play.

Mocked for his vitiligo, Jyothish spent years hiding from the world until love and a daring dream to act pulled him into the light. But when rejection and cruelty test him, he discovers that real victory isnt fame or approval, but the courage to stand tall, unbroken, and redefine what makes him extraordinary.
Twelve years after saving his daughter Arya from a dark force, Atharva learns it never left her. When strange events begin again, he must fight to save her once more.

Extraordinary events unfold when an aimless trio of friends encounter their new neighbour - a mysterious young woman with a haunting past. A darkly comic fantasy thriller set in a modern-day metropolitan city, this is the first instalment of a franchise that introduces a shadow world that exists alongside our own.

North ka swag, South ki grace - two worlds collide and sparks fly.

Dinesh Vijan presents Param Sundari, a love story directed by Tushar Jalota.

t: Arjun Chakravarthy: Journey of an Unsung Champion
d: Set in 1970s-80s India, Arjun Chakravarthy is a gripping tale of passion, perseverance, and patriotism. Based on the true story of a forgotten kabaddi legend, the film follows Arjun`s rise from village grounds to national glory, overcoming poverty, politics, and personal loss. Blending high-intensity sports action with heartfelt drama, this inspiring film honours a hero who played for pride, not fame.

Love, laughter... and a little bit of revenge.

When cracks appear in a picture-perfect marriage, things spiral from petty to outrageous in the most unexpected ways. The Roses is a sharp, entertaining look at love, egos, and everything in between. The perfect date night watch for couples who enjoy a little chaos with their comedy.

Bela is a biographical film about Bela Dey, a pioneering radio personality at Akashvani Kolkata. After her husband`s abandonment, she reinvents herself in England and returns to India to create the empowering radio show Mohila Mahal, which impacts millions of women. The film showcases her resilience, breaking societal norms, and championing women`s empowerment. Directed by Anilava Chatterjee and starring Rituparna Sengupta, it honors Bela`s legacy in Bengali media.

Veera Vanakkam is an extraordinary movie about the relationship between Tamil Nadu and Kerala. It begins with the love story of a wealthy upper-caste girl and an educated Dalit youth in a Tamil village.

Upright police inspector Sonia Agarwal dives into a murder case in Kodaikanal`s misty hills. Odd clues, including a chicken that seems to track the killer, quickly lead her to a sinister real estate mafia. They`re spreading ghost rumours to illegally seize guesthouses, and Sonia soon realises the murder is tied to their sprawling conspiracy. With sharp instincts and solid evidence, she races to expose the truth behind the fabricated haunting and bring down the powerful culprits.
A young Bengali detective in London delves into a century-old legend of a deadly hound, uncovering dark secrets and unexpected suspects in a race to solve the mystery before it claims another life.
It is the story of actor Abhimanyu Banerjee, who descends into the darkness of his roles. As he searches for his true self, he becomes lost in the mesmerizing world of countless characters.
A darker spirit, a bloodier mission. This time he is not the same!

Jhor follows Michael, a suspended officer, on a mission to find two missing girls after his student Jane is mysteriously injured. As he uncovers hidden truths, the search reveals a dark side of society masked by light.

A national security officer enlists a troubled man to infiltrate a dangerous criminal gang. The man, who has a unique mental condition, must use his unconventional abilities to bring down the powerful underworld and survive his high-stakes mission.
Dil Madharaasi is a Hindi movie starring Sivakarthikeyan, Rukmini Vasanth, Vidyut Jammwal, Biju Menon and Shabeer Kallarakkal in prominent roles. It is written and directed by A.R. Murugadoss
A story of a woman who is a victim, a criminal and a legend.
Ed and Lorraine Warren face their most haunting and dangerous case yet, as they confront sinister entities that threaten to unravel everything they hold dear.
Hostel 3 is a Nepali movie starring Paras Bam Thakuri and Ryhaan Giri in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Sashan Kandel.
Based on true incidents, a girl and a taxi driver on the Tamil NaduKarnataka border in 2004 are unknowingly pulled into a night of crime, conspiracy, and chaos as they struggle to reunite.

When researcher Sukumar Roy arrives in Bishnupur for work, his trip takes a dark turn after a local man`s mistress is found murdered. With the police closing in and Sukumar caught in the middle, his friend Basab steps in. Believing Sukumar is innocent, Basab launches his own investigation, using his cunning intelligence to outsmart the real killer.

Set in the late 1980s in the Himalayas, Jugnuma tells the story of Dev, a man whose life is turned upside down by a series of mysterious fires destroying his fruit orchards. As he struggles to stop the outbreaks, the escalating mystery forces him to confront not only the truth behind the blazes but also the long-hidden secrets of his family and his own past.

A street-smart young man discovers he is the only answer and the shield to stop a powerful force from reaching the nine sacred books of King Ashoka. Mirai is his journey of experiencing the power of Brahmand.

Amar and Prachi, two star-crossed lovers, are all set to embark on a romantic journey, but an unexpected hurdle forces their beautiful story to a halt. Now, they must decide whether to walk away or fight to stay with each other. It`s love in all its maddening glory!

Bin Lagnachi Goshta centers on Ashay and Ritika, a modern live-in couple facing disapproval from Ashay`s traditional parents. The situation is complicated by Ritika`s deeply strained relationship with her own mother, Uma. When Ritika`s pregnancy forces them to seek help, a domestic volunteer brings Uma into their lives, compelling mother and daughter to confront a difficult past and an explosive family secret.

t: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle
d: The Demon Slayer Corps plunge into Infinity Castle to defeat Muzan. However, the remaining Hashiras and the Demon Slayers who survived Tanjiro's Final Selection are pitted against the remaining members of the Twelve Kizuki first.
A ghost walking tour takes a chilling turn when a group of enthusiasts enters an abandoned radio station, unwittingly awakening a vengeful spirit that begins to hunt them down.
In the summer of 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the center of a public scandal and the family faces financial trouble.

Heer Express is a family drama that follows the journey of Heer, an ordinary girl who moves to London to make her mother proud. Amid the excitement of a new city, she faces unexpected struggles and uncovers a hidden family secret that changes everything.

Fuelled by a lifetime of suffering, an ex army man embarks on a vengeful quest. Standing in his way is a police constable whose own past pain transformed into a dutiful son. When their paths converge, hero either can flee for his life or take a stand against the villain`s scheme of things.

This film is a unique love story told through two parallel journeys, where `Hema Malini` is a symbol for forbidden desires. A homeopath treats a woman who introduces herself by that name, while an independent filmmaker struggles to complete a film with the same title. The two stories eventually converge, transforming their personal struggles into unconventional love stories of a kind.

Fuelled by a lifetime of suffering, an ex army man embarks on a vengeful quest. Standing in his way is a police constable whose own past pain transformed into a dutiful son. When their paths converge, hero either can flee for his life or take a stand against the villain`s scheme of things.

In a relentless quest for the truth, Abhirami searches for her fiance, Kiran, who has mysteriously disappeared. She teams up with investigative journalist Aswin, but their pursuit of answers uncovers a complex web of secrets and questions, drawing them deeper into a mystery far greater than they ever imagined.
This historical biopic chronicles the life of Guru Balakdas Ji. The film portrays his courage and sacrifice, reviving a legendary chapter of history on the big screen.

t: Ajey: The Untold Story of a Yogi
d: Ajey: The Untold Story of a Yogi traces the remarkable journey of Ajay Singh Bisht, from a Himalayan village to becoming Yogi Adityanath, a monk, spiritual leader, and Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh. Based on Shantanu Gupta`s bestselling book, the film blends politics and spirituality in a compelling biopic.
A story of twin brothers caught between crime and conscience, where love, loss, and fate test the strength of their bond.
A fearless hustler who fights for the people takes on a ruthless powerhouse, unleashing a storm of justice, rebellion, and revenge.

Set in the beautiful village of Vengurla, Kurla to Vengurla is a heartwarming rom-com that follows three unique love stories. Each couple finds their relationship tested as city ambitions clash with the traditions of their small-town home, making for a compelling story of love and the search for balance.
Tyngkai is a Khasi movie starring Phira Dohtdong, Sherilin Khongwar and Goldenstar Suchiang in prominent roles. It is directed by Section Syiemlieh.

Six horticulture students visit a remote plant resort for thesis projects. Unnatural events occur, leading to bizarre murders. The remaining students must uncover the killer`s motive and shocking method to solve the mystery.

Padaiyanda Maaveera is a political action-drama inspired by the life of firebrand leader Kaduvetti Guru, tracing his journey from grassroots activist to fearless community voice. Blending raw rural politics with emotional depth, it captures the charisma, confrontations, and legacy of a true warrior.

A musician is gifted with the supernatural ability to see a couple's romantic destiny whenever they kiss. But when he sees the grim fate of the woman he loves, he must use his powers to defy destiny itself.

Anand, a 30-something city dweller compelled to spend a 10-day mourning period for his father in the rugged countryside of western India, tenderly bonds with a local farmer who is struggling to stay unmarried. As the mourning ends, forcing his return, Anand must decide the fate of his relationship born under duress.

In this uproarious courtroom comedy, the smart-alec Jolly Mishra and the Jugadu Jolly Tyagi find themselves back in Judge Tripathi's court ensuing a rollercoaster ride of razor-sharp banter, outrageous legal maneuvers, and heartfelt moments as these lawyers try to outsmart, outplay, and outtalk each other. Packed with laugh-out-loud chaos, dramatic twists, and unexpected bursts of compassion, it's the ultimate legal showdown.
Experience a touching family drama filled with pure love, heartfelt emotions, and a powerful fatherson bond. A movie that promises laughter, tears, and togetherness for audiences of all ages.

A piece of jewellery becomes the centre of chaos in modern relationships. A bangle causes familial conflict and emotional tension in a story that explores how small objects can have large consequences.

In the tribal villages along the Tamil Nadu-Karnataka border, Murugan`s admiration for uniformed services leads him to join the Indian Army after losing his job in the forest department. But once enlisted, he discovers that the reality of his dream job is far from what he imagined.
A fearless hustler who fights for the people takes on a ruthless powerhouse, unleashing a storm of justice, rebellion, and revenge.

In a village ruled by rigid traditions, a mans reckless pursuit of morality clashes with his fathers quiet endurance, while a young mechanics silent battles uncover moving truths about love, sacrifice, and responsibility.

A young vlogger named Stuti Mishra travels to a village where she uncovers a terrifying tradition of witch-hunting. She soon learns that the practice is a sinister cover for the village Sarpanch`s greed. Armed with her camera, she must fight to expose the truth and end the brutal tradition.

After vanishing from Mumbai`s underworld for a decade, mob boss Ojas Gambheera resurfaces-feared, unstoppable, and with a single goal: to reclaim his empire and exact vengeance on the current tyrant, Omi Bhau. As loyalties fracture and alliances shift, OG reignites a brutal criminal war, confronting both external threats and haunting buried betrayals.

Chardham - A Journey Within is a spiritual travel drama about a pilgrim`s transformative journey through India`s sacred Chardham shrines. The film focuses on themes of devotion, self-discovery, and the beautiful landscapes encountered along the route.
Raghu Dakat is a fantasy folklore that unearths one of the most pertinent chapters of Bengal`s history through an icon who rises to emerge as a legend.
Raktabeej 2 is a gripping action thriller and the much-anticipated sequel to the 2023 blockbuster Raktabeej.

t: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
d: Denji encounters a new romantic interest, Reze, who, unbeknownst to him, harbors a dangerous ulterior motive.

Aditya, a villager who resents his reporter brother-in-law, Akash, finds his life shattered by a brutal conspiracy. After Akash exposes the crimes of corrupt builders David and Daniel, Aditya's pregnant sister, Sandhya, becomes a target and is tragically killed. Devastated by grief, Aditya rises to take on the builders' powerful empire, seeking justice and revenge for his sister in this gripping story of love, loss, and the fight against corruption.

Sree Leela, a mischievous college student, accidentally damages Viraat`s car. When she can`t afford to pay for it, he gives her two options, kiss him or work as his assistant for two months. She chooses the latter. As they clash and connect, love quietly brews. But just when she`s ready to confess, he pushes her away. Only later does he realize he can`t live without her. Will love find it`s way back?
Everyone has heard about one-sided love, but have you ever heard about one-sided friendship?

In a village where sabotaging weddings is a competitive sport, a long-standing tradition is challenged by the younger generation`s Valsala Club. The rivalry reaches a boiling point when legendary wrecker Aravindan sabotages his own son`s wedding to win the annual award. In retaliation, the club disrupts the award ceremony and makes a high-stakes bet: they must get Aravindan`s son, Venu, married within a week, or they disband forever. If they succeed, the tradition itself will be abolished. What follows is a humorous race against time to see who wins this extraordinary bet.
Chalo Bulaava Aaya Hai is a Punjabi movie starring Pukhraj Bhalla, Arvinder Kaur, Avtar Gill and Rana Jung Bahadur in prominent roles. It is directed by Satinder Singh Dev.

Tara and Akash: Love Beyond Realms follows Tara, a young woman on a solo trip to Switzerland, whose journey takes an unexpected turn when she meets a mysterious man named Akash. Their magical love story quickly unfolds, and with the guidance of a reclusive man, they discover their connection was preordained by fate. However, as the truth of their divine bond emerges, they must face the tragic reality that their time together may be brief.
Avaidh is a Bhojpuri movie starring Khesari Lal Yadav, Aparna Mallick, Yamini Singh and Samarth Chaturvedi in prominent roles. It is directed by Niraj Randhir.

Two childhood friends from a small North Indian village chase a police job that promises them the dignity they`ve long been denied. But as they inch closer to their dream, mounting desperation threatens the bond that holds them together.

On the Kerala-Tamil Nadu border, in Velampalayam, where kabaddi is life, four fierce players of the Panjami Raiders rule the streets with pride and power. But when love, betrayal, and gang wars collide, brothers in arms turn into bitter rivals. Now, justice and revenge will clash in a battle where only one can stand tall.
Moonnam Nombaram is a Malayalam movie starring Sajan Sooreya, Dhanya Mary Varghese, Dinesh Panicker, Ambika Mohan and Kriss Venugopal in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Joshy Illath.
Her hunger for fame came from a wound only love could heal. This isnt a love story, its what burns.

Set against the backdrop of British colonial rule, Devi Chowdhurani tells the untold story of India`s first female freedom fighter.

From a humble villager to a fearless rebel, she rises against oppression with the support of Hindu monks, leading the first armed revolution against the British East India Company. A tale of courage, sacrifice, and resilience, this historical epic brings to life a forgotten chapter of India`s fight for freedom.

Chandana and Charmi, childhood sweethearts who grew up playing together, are now on the cusp of marriage. However, their happiness is short-lived when a mysterious incident on the eve of their wedding throws their relationship into turmoil. Will they overcome the obstacles and make their love last, or will the truth tear them apart?

Panai is a social drama that celebrates the palm tree and the lives of those who depend on it. The film revolves around a love story between a temple priests daughter and a young palm worker, a relationship that leads to dramatic consequences. It blends personal conflict with a powerful message about preserving palm cultivation and the livelihoods it sustains.

A desperate father`s search for his missing son takes a terrifying turn when he becomes trapped inside a police station. As a mysterious entity seals the building, he and the others inside are forced to confront their darkest secrets in a deadly game.
God Father is a Bhojpuri movie starring Khesari Lal Yadav, Astha Singh and Yamini Singh in prominent roles. It is directed by Parag Patil.

Kolya Gerasimov finds himself in the future, but nothing is easy. Pirate forces are secretly preparing to go back in time to change the course of history, and Kolya unwittingly becomes their tool for time travel.

Washed-up revolutionary Bob exists in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited, self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her, as father and daughter both battle the consequences of his past.

Ram Srivastava, a former IFS officer who left his job after a devastating incident, now works in the IT sector. His quiet life is shattered when his uncle, Mihir, a RAW spy, is killed by a cyber terrorist organization. Framed for the murder and armed with a secret about an imminent attack on the nation, Ram must rely on every skill he abandoned to race against time, save the country, and clear his name.

The Strangers are back, more brutal and relentless than ever. After learning their victim, Maya, is still alive, the three masked maniacs return to finish the job. With nowhere to run and no one to trust, Maya must survive a horrific chapter of terror against the psychopaths, who are more than willing to kill anyone who stands in their way.

Kutram Thavir follows Rudra, whose elder sister dies due to a fraudulent medical insurance scheme, leading him to uncover a conspiracy exploiting the poor. Consumed by grief and anger, he sets out to seek revenge and expose the truth behind her death.

A simpleton born in a village shifts to Dubai to chase his dreams, and for work. However, after an unforeseen catastrophe he is forced to come back to the village, where he realises its value and stands for whatever his father wished for against all odds.
The moment has arrived. The divine forest whispers. A Legend was born!

Nikka, a village boy, falls for the beautiful city girl Angel Preet. Determined to win her heart and his traditional grandmother Bebe`s approval, he sets out on a mission. The two marry, but a shocking secret soon turns their happily-ever-after into a rollercoaster of chaos, drama, and surprises.

Set against the backdrop of Delhi, the film is based on a humorously convoluted premise of two ex-lovers trying to win their love back. Amidst an extravagantly dramatic tale of innocent deception and comical misunderstandings, an accidental love story blossoms. Who would get their happy ending in the middle of the hilarious chaos?

Set against the backdrop of their thriving Vada Paav empire in London, this bittersweet and baffling story follows the Deshmukh family. Much like the simple yet surprising dish, the film blends love, laughter, and a full range of emotions to explore the complicated relationships that, ultimately, are what keep a family together.
This story explores a nun`s quest for liberation, as she yearns to live a normal life. However, society and her family stand in her way. What will be her ultimate fate?
When corruption and betrayal destroy his family, a noble doctor named Alex takes justice into his own hands avenging his sister's suffering and sealing his fate with a death sentence.

When a person arrives in a new country, his life takes a terrifying turn after he suddenly loses his passport and all other documents. As he struggles to navigate his predicament, he finds himself trapped by people involved in terrorist activities. This high-stakes thriller follows his desperate fight for survival.

A simple attempt to buy a new mattress transforms Fathima`s life as she defies her controlling husband, breaking free from years of silent oppression and reclaiming her autonomy through an act of quiet rebellion.

Kyrshan, a taxi driver, rescues a kidnapped girl and later falls in love with her while taking care of her. His life is complicated by his strong bond with his best friend, Bahrit. The film unfolds as Kyrshan faces a heartbreaking dilemma, forced to choose between the girl he loves and the loyalty of his best friend.
Amid a ghost employment scam, a determined daughter races to prove her father's innocence, only to find herself trapped in a gripping mystery following a financier's sudden death.

This dark comedy follows four immigrant Indians who meet in London over a dinner party, and the ensuing hilarity that follows when the host greets them with the line - "there is a dead body in the trunk."

t: 2019 BTS World Tour Love Yourself: Speak Yourself London - Remastered
d: BTS's most dazzling moments come to life once again on screen. Relive the concerts that have shaped BTS's journey, now beautifully remastered for cinemas!
Krondon is an Assamese movie written and directed by Pakhila Kalita.

Mutton Soup is a suspense thriller. It is about a young wife and husband. They face some complications in the process of their marriage and after the marriage. Suddenly, one incident will happen in their life
In a patriarchal village consumed by rumours of an illicit affair, Avihitham lays bare the absurdities of societal judgement and the relentless scrutiny of a woman`s identity.
Sasivadane is a Telugu movie starring Rakshit and Komalee Prasad in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Sai Mohan Ubbana.

On the Kerala-Tamil Nadu border, in Velampalayam, where kabaddi is life, four fierce players of the Panjami Raiders rule the streets with pride and power. But when love, betrayal, and gang wars collide, brothers in arms turn into bitter rivals. Now, justice and revenge will clash in a battle where only one can stand tall.

Constable Kashi lives a quiet life, treating his sister-in-law like family and settling into his new posting in Mokila. He forms a strong bond with fellow constable Bhadram, unaware of the horrors awaiting them. When a series of brutal murders rocks the village, Kashi must rise to the challenge. With his sharp instincts and secret admirer Mahati by his side, he dives into a chilling investigation that pushes him to his limits.

Burdened by a troubled past, a rickshaw driver named Laalo finds himself mysteriously trapped in a remote farmhouse. In his isolation, he begins to see visions of Lord Krishna, who guides him on a profound journey of redemption. What begins as a physical struggle to escape becomes an internal battle to heal from his past and find hope.

Bhojpuri action-drama film Bhrashtachar centres on a fearless journalist who single-handedly takes on a powerful, corrupt system and its politician, only to be framed by the very forces he opposes. The film blends intense action, social issues, and emotion in a compelling fight against injustice.
IAS Kannamma is a Tamil movie starring Thaa Rajachozhan, Princy, Kovai Arumugam and Attu Kutty in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Thaa Rajachozhan.
Kayilan is a thriller drama directed by Arul Ajit. The movie features Ramya Pandian, Prajin, Manobala, Gnanasambandham and others.

A mysterious man puts up an advertisement on social media platforms claiming `any kind of wish is fulfilled`. Seeing this, six people representing Arishadvargas (Anger, Lust, Pride, Greed, Jealousy, and Attachment) come to meet him. Will their wishes be fulfilled?
Abhay, shattered by betrayal and loneliness, prepares to end his life beneath the night sky. But the sudden laughter of a mysterious woman pierces his darkness.
Navadurga is a Bengali movie starring Papiya Adhikari and Nibedita Sen in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Satyabrata.
A ghost walking tour takes a chilling turn when a group of enthusiasts enters an abandoned radio station, unwittingly awakening a vengeful spirit that begins to hunt them down.

Haunted by the memories of a lost love, a man tracks down his ex-girlfriend during a secluded road trip with her husband-only to trigger a chain of unexpected and chaotic events that will change all of their lives forever.

Kumaraswamy lives happily with his family until his wife Indira gets possessed by a spirit. He calls her brother Charan for help. Together, they approach a spiritual guru. The spirit reveals itself as Kalajyothi, who once loved Charan and was killed by goons. What happens next forms the crux of the story.
Jai Sitla Maiya is a Chhattisgarhi movie directed by Punit Sonkar. The movie features Lileshwar Sinha and Sonali Sahare in the lead roles.

The story is set in the remote hinterland near Neyyar Dam, home to the scholar Vaidyar and the neighbouring family of Kaladharan and Ragini. Their quiet life, shared with children Surya and Sudevan, is marked by the past upheaval caused by their older daughter, Arya, who eloped with Anand, a medical student from Maha Vaidy.
Welcome to Uttarakhand is a Hindi movie starring Rehana Khan and Mahesh Prakash in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Mahesh Prakash.

Set in Punjab during the 1990s, Soohe Ve Cheere Waleya is a soulful tale bridging love and borders. Sooba, running a shop near the Indo-Pak border, finds solace in poetry aired on Lahore Radio, unaware that it belongs to Naazo, a mute girl in Pakistan. Amidst family struggles and border deception, a twist of fate connects them via a secret channel through army wireless sets. What follows is an emotional journey that unites two hearts and revives the unfinished stories of Partition.

After one of his daughters is falsely defamed, Chaman Lal, a man living on the banks of the Ravi River, finds the marriage prospects of all four of his daughters destroyed. When a traveller named Sikander helps him realise that true happiness lies in inner peace rather than in society's judgment, Chaman Lal regains hope. Embracing this new wisdom, he eventually restores his daughters' lives and finds a renewed sense of purpose.
An old man, Balan Marar, and a teenager, Ashitha Begum, two strangers from different walks of life, are forced by chance to spend some time together.

The peaceful life of Kanniyappan, a hardworking farmer, is shattered when his ancestral farmland is auctioned off due to a mysterious unpaid loan he never took out. Devastated and shocked, Kanniyappan`s life takes a dark turn as he embarks on a desperate mission to unravel the truth behind the fraudulent auction and fight for his land.

Inspired by true events, Saira Khan Case follows Saira Khan, a foreign national devastated when her husband, Hanif, issues a unilateral talaq and isolates her from their three sons as part of a scheme to remarry. Refusing to accept the betrayal, Saira launches a determined legal battle, fighting for her children and her rights against one-sided Muslim personal laws within India`s secular system.

Karan, a wealthy playboy and hotel owner, falls for Jasmine, a new employee. Just as he confesses his feelings, a mysterious man, Akash, enters the picture, unravelling secrets that change everything for Karan and Jasmine, altering their lives forever.
The story of legendary mixed martial arts & UFC fighter Mark Kerr.
BTS`s most dazzling moments come to life once again on screen. Relive the concerts that have shaped BTS`s journey, now beautifully remastered for cinemas!
Irudhi Muyarchi is a Tamil movie starring Ranjith and Meghali Meenakshi in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Venkat Janaa.

Pavani, a gifted classical dancer, battles marital conflict, infertility, and societal pressure. Turning to her art for strength, she starts a dance school that inspires women to chase their own dreams.
A gang of good-for-nothing friends get caught in a hilarious mess between a fiery politician and his rebellious daughter, thanks to love and sheer stupidity.

In a world where solitude is a choice, a mother and her daughter have built a life of peace and devotion on a secluded island. However, a fleeting moment captured online catapults them into the glaring spotlight of social media.

Motivated to win the hand of his sweetheart, Kaikeyi Menon, Tony Jose Alula joins his father`s detective agency. Starting as a `Pet Detective`, Tony`s cases quickly escalate into a dangerous kidnapping involving international smugglers. With rival Inspector Rajath constantly in his way, Tony must solve the case, clear his name, and prove he is worthy of Kaikeyi`s love.
Kambi Katna Kathai is a Tamil movie starring Natrajan Subramanian, Aarthi Shaalini, Mukesh Ravi, Singam Puli in prominent roles. It is directed by Rajanathan Periyasamy.
Vikram Number 1 is a Gujarati movie directed by  Jitu Pandya. The movie features Vikram Thakor, Sweta Sen and others.
A well-meaning but rather inept angel named Gabriel meddles in the lives of a struggling gig worker and a wealthy venture capitalist.

Matru Devo Bhava is a deeply moving film that examines the supreme sacrifice and devotion of women in Indian society, conveying a profound message of female empathy. The narrative follows Ganga, a woman who sacrifices everything for her family. Burdened by an incurable illness, she is ultimately forced to leave her children alone. This emotional story highlights that a mother is the true embodiment of love, leaving the audience deeply moved and inspired.

Agan and Kural have been a part of each other's lives for as long as they can remember, sharing countless moments that have shaped who they are. As they step into a new phase of life, unforeseen challenges test their understanding of themselves and the world around them, leading them on a journey of growth, choices, and change.

"Imli" tells the inspiring story of a talented tribal girl from rural Maharashtra who defies odds to become a national gold medalist in archery, showcasing her dedication, perseverance, and rising to greatness despite humble beginnings.

When Naveen brings his fiance Jay home to meet his traditional Indian family, they must contend with accepting his white-orphan-artist boyfriend and helping them plan the Indian wedding of their dreams.
Four years after high school, three girls reunite to confront a demonic Ludo game that claimed their friends life and unleashed a lifelong curse.

Upekshita is a film centered on the conflicts and multi-dimensional struggles of a woman in a cruel society. It highlights that society is still unprepared to fully embrace gender equality and the heartfelt acceptance of the female child.

Gabby heads out on a road trip with her Grandma Gigi to the urban wonderland of Cat Francisco. But when Gabby`s dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, Gabby sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together and save the dollhouse before it`s too late

The intense thriller Pathiraathri centers on the turbulent relationship between probationary SI Jancy and constable Hareesh at Anakkara Police Station, primarily fueled by Hareesh's immature attitude toward women. Both officers are also struggling with deep family problems. One night, while on patrol, an unexpected incident turns their lives upside down. The chain of events that follows forces them to confront the conflicts of their personal relationships, the heavy weight of responsibility, and their fight for the truth.

Timepass is a quirky dark comedy that follows the chaotic lives of seven dreamers, each determined to make it big in the film industry. With no support from family or society, theyre mocked, doubted, and dismissed. But when fate brings them together, they form an oddball crew with an outrageous idea: shoot a full movie in just one day.

Armed with zero budget and plenty of madness, they dive headfirst into their wild mission. From clashing egos to unpredictable mishaps, what unfolds is a hilarious rollercoaster of passion and pure desperation. Will they pull it off, or will it all fall apart before the final cut?

The possible difficulties and outcomes of cohabiting without marriage, aimed at teenagers, highlight the potential dangers and repercussions of living together without being married, helping them make informed choices about their relationships.

Pura Nevu Aapli East Indian Sanskruti is a vibrant musical celebrating the rich traditions, values, and lively spirit of the East Indian Marathi community, from childhood and love to culture, festivals, and heartfelt tributes to our brave soldiers.
Telusu Kada is a romantic drama that centers on a man caught in a complex love triangle with two women. He is forced to navigate the profound complexities of love, family, and self-discovery.

A young woman, scarred by her family's dark past, enters the lives of two wealthy brothers. Using love, charm, and manipulation, she seeks to destroy their father, the man responsible for her parents downfall, but her heart betrays her when she truly falls for one of them.

An ambitious MPSC aspirant mocked for his looks falls for a classmates fake love, only to face heartbreak, tragedy, and a final twist when fate brings them together as a blind officer and a suspected criminal.
K-Ramp is a Telugu movie directed by Jains Nani. The movie features Kiran Abbavaram and Yukti Thareja in the lead roles.

Thamma is a supernatural horror-comedy centring on Alok, a television reporter whose life is saved by a mysterious woman named Tadaka following a bear attack. Their burgeoning relationship is immediately complicated by supernatural forces and ancient myths, as Alok discovers Tadaka belongs to a mystical, bloodline-driven tribe led by the formidable Yakshasan. Their forbidden romance quickly escalates into a conflict against supernatural reckoning and powerful family ties.

An ordinary teacher, craving excitement, discovers a village devastated by financial crisis caused by corruption that has stolen their lands. Instead of despairing, he sees an opportunity and suggests a bold plan: if the system has robbed the poor, then why not rob the system? Only seven women and an elderly man agree to join this risky heist.

Armed with wit, courage, and a dash of madness, they set out to challenge the powerful. Will they succeed in their daring revenge, or fall victim like so many others? The story blends action, comedy, and social insight into a powerful tale of bravery and unexpected strength.

Set in a vibrant Punjabi village, Godday Godday Chaa 2 takes audiences on a hilarious journey as women take charge of wedding festivities once dominated by men. Their spirited attempts to preserve this newfound power led to comic chaos, as the sidelined men plot to reclaim their former glory only to be outsmarted at every turn.

Ultimately, the story unfolds into a heartwarming realization of mutual respect and equality, celebrating the beauty of partnership over dominance. The film explores evolving traditions, shifting gender dynamics, and the harmony of co-existence.

The first part won the National Award for Best Punjabi Film and the legacy continues this Diwali.

A heartwarming family drama where the loving brother-sister bond of Aparna and Saurav is challenged by a family feud. Will their unbreakable bond stand the test of time? As they say, the closest relationships are the hardest to fight against.

When a poor young woman's kidneys fail, a wealthy man risks his life to save her. Simultaneously, her best friend sacrifices her own happiness by marrying the woman's lover. The film is a dramatic narrative of interconnected lives, bound by the powerful themes of love, friendship, and selfless devotion.

After decades of silence, two estranged best friends are unexpectedly reunited through their children, only to face their unresolved past when the youngsters become entangled in a complicated romance that threatens to repeat history.

When two brothers separate their aging parents out of convenience, sending them to an old age home, they realize too late that the love they took for granted can never be repaid once hearts are broken.

After learning from a sorcerer that a hidden treasure can be found by sacrificing a young girl named Lucky, two greedy men, Dayal Reddy and Shankar Reddy, murder her grandparents and brutally sacrifice the girl. Years later, a reality show host named Virat and his crew arrive at the house to film a paranormal show, only to discover that Lucky`s spirit truly haunts the home. The film is a chilling tale of survival as Virat and his friends must decide whether to join forces with Lucky`s vengeful spirit to end the evil for good.

Shiva, a 27-year-old manager, uncovers exploitation of local weavers in a failing silk saree cooperative. With the help of a girlfriend and friends, he confronts corrupt businessmen and establishes Dharmavaram sarees as an authentic brand.

Nellikampoyil, a village bound by age-old myths, is gripped by strange, restless nights. Shyam, an energetic charmer, hopeless romantic, and the heart of his friend circle, is drawn into the mystery. With his friends by his side, he embarks on a journey that forces him to face his deepest fear, as the boundary between myth and reality fades into an unforgettable ordeal.

Kombada Palala Landon La is a Marathi movie starring Anant Jog, Surekha Kudachi, Arun Nalavade, Shantanu Moghe and Chetan Dalvi in prominent roles. It is directed by Pramod Ambalkar and Ravi Khillare.

A weary taxi driver becomes the unlikely lifeline for a silent woman haunted by a devastating past. As he navigates their unexpected bond, the woman's traumatic history as a survivor of a communal clash is slowly brought to light through a viral, desperate plea for help.

A robbery occurs at a jewellery shop in the city, prompting a Police Inspector to investigate. Meanwhile, a college girl commits suicide by hanging herself on campus, and the Inspector takes up that case as well. The police explore a possible connection between the two incidents, starting with the girl's parents. In the end, they make a shocking discovery to uncover the reason behind her suicide.
Kanoli Bandset is a Malayalam movie directed by Gautham Ravindran. The movie features Roshan Chandra, Lisha Ponni, and Rishi Suresh.

A group of six young software engineers, known for creating viral YouTube content, plan a fun weekend birthday celebration in Madikeri. Their getaway quickly turns dark when they discover a woman's body in their room the next morning. The story unfolds into a mysterious tale of deceit, ambition, and betrayal.

Inspired by true events and based on a District Forest Officer's diary, DFO Diary: Forest Warriors is an untold story of courage and sacrifice set in Uttarakhand. The film captures the bravery and resilience of forest officers and villagers, highlighting their battles against poachers, timber mafias, and threats like the 2024 Binsar forest fire. This episodic cinematic tribute to India's eco-warriors.

Karthik, a strict, intelligent, and brave police officer, is assigned to investigate a series of clueless rapes targeting girls in their own homes without their notice. He secretly begins his investigation, inadvertently kick-starting a dangerous chain of events.

Green is a gripping psychological thriller set against the backdrop of a mysterious, terrifying forest. As the protagonist descends deeper into isolation and fear, the forest grows darker, blurring the line between reality and delusion. Intense and thought-provoking, Green is a must-watch for fans of psychological, mind-bending thrillers.

Sunita, a visually impaired woman, battles immense personal and societal challenges, from completing her education to pursuing her passions in sports and music. Abandoned by her husband while pregnant, she fights illness and adversity to raise her two children and reclaim her dignity.

When life pulls you down, love lifts you up. Based on the bestselling book, 'Regretting You' introduces audiences to a mother and daughter who explore what's left behind after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal. The tragedy forces them to confront family secrets, redefine love, and rediscover each other. 'Regretting You' is a powerful story of growth, resilience, and self-discovery in the aftermath of heartbreak.

Yaarigu Helbedi is a fun-filled drama with twists, laughter, and friendship at its heart. The story follows a man whose one small lie unexpectedly snowballs into chaos, putting his relationships and future at stake. With a blend of humour, emotion, and youthful energy, the film explores how far someone will go to protect a secret and the comedy that unfolds when the truth comes out.

t: La Liga El Clasico (Real Madrid vs Barcelona)
d: Two of Spains biggest rivals go head-to-head in La Liga between Real Madrid and Barcelona, the iconic El Clsico.

"Desiya Thalaivar" is a biographical film based on the life of Pasumpon Muthuramalinga Thevar, a prominent national leader and freedom fighter from Tamil Nadu. The movie explores his contributions to India's struggle for independence, his role in social movements like the Temple Entry movement, and his impactful political journey.

When fate wipes away his memories, Shambhu is left stranded between an unknown past and a dangerous present. Hunted by a ruthless mafia gang he once worked for and haunted by flashes of a lost love, he must fight his way through betrayal, revenge, and redemption to uncover the truth about who he really is. In a world where every face hides a secret, Shambhus journey becomes a battle for identity, love, and survival.
The Taj Story follows the life of Vishnu Das, a local guide who becomes driven by a curiosity to uncover the true history behind the iconic Taj Mahal monument.

Ansh and Kavya once pursued the mysterious theory of 18 Heartbeats, a journey that ultimately faded into silence. A decade later, their forgotten quest is dramatically reawakened when a college professor stumbles upon it amidst a burgeoning student protest.

Suspended but not defeated, an NIA agent, an ACP, and a constable uncover a dark conspiracy linking arms trafficking, espionage, and human weapon camps. With no backup and time running out, they must fight from the shadows to expose a faceless enemy.

Punha Shivajiraje Bhosle is a gripping socio-political drama that begins with a farmer`s suicide, a tragedy that devastates young Rakhma`s family and sparks her desperate cry for justice. Her plea awakens the spirit of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who returns to modern-day Maharashtra to confront corruption, greed, and systemic exploitation in rural India. His resurgence becomes the catalyst for a people`s revolution, a powerful movement to restore dignity, justice, and hope to the state`s forgotten farmers.

The story follows a clever trickster who uses his wit to navigate life, juggling romance, action, and deception. As situations spiral, his cunning ways draw him into unexpected challenges that test both his heart and his survival.
Ram Abdullah Antony is a Tamil movie starring Poovaiyar Kappis, Ajay Arnold, Soundararaja and Sai Deena in prominent roles. It is directed by Jayavel T.

Rohan's affluent lifestyle spirals out of control as he becomes convinced there is a supernatural entity in his home. As he starts to uncover the mystery, he is drawn into unexpected worlds and alliances, along with the horrors that lie ahead.

A free-spirited photographers brief romance with a pottery instructor unexpectedly blossoms into real love, but just as their bond begins to grow, fate tests them with trials of patience and the strength to hold on. Misri sparkles with energy and charm, a modern romantic comedy thats fresh, feel-good, and full of lifes sweetest moments.

A loyal dog moves to a rural family home with his owner Todd, only to discover supernatural forces lurking in the shadows. As dark entities threaten his human companion, the brave pup must fight to protect the one he loves most.

Bad dreams haunt 15-year-old Gwen as she receives calls from the black phone and sees disturbing visions of three boys being stalked at a winter camp. Accompanied by her brother, Finn, they head to the camp to solve the mystery, only to confront the Grabber -- a killer who's grown even more powerful in death.
Omen follows a haunting investigation captured through chilling found footage, where every frame hides a secret. What begins as documentation soon spirals into a terrifying supernatural experience
Baahubali: The Epic is a combined narrative of the two-part Indian film saga, weaving together the grandeur and drama of Baahubali: The Beginning and Baahubali: The Conclusion into one epic tale.
Two conspiracy-obsessed men kidnap the CEO of a major company when they become convinced that she's an alien who wants to destroy Earth.

A middle-aged, failed writer stuns everyone when he boldly declares that he is about to commit the perfect crime. What follows is a gripping cat-and-mouse chase as a determined cop and his team race against time to stop a chillingly well-planned series of murders.

Madhaniyan is a Punjabi family drama about a sister (Neeru Bajwa) who raises her younger brother (Nav Bajwa) after their mothers death.

She falls in love with a boy from Bathinda (Dev Kharoud), but her brother dreams of a different future for her.

A clash of love, family, and values beginswill her love story succeed against his wishes?
Mass Jathara is a Telugu action entertainer directed by Bhanu Bogavarapu, featuring Ravi Teja and Sree Leela in pivotal roles.

Set in the unsettling village of Manjadikunnu, the story follows powerful former District Panchayat President Thekkattil Zacharia Punnus and his son John Zacharia as they grapple with a wave of mysterious deaths of women. Amid the turmoil, a model named Shanu arrives searching for a missing girl, setting the stage for a suspense-filled narrative layered with intrigue and unexpected twists.

A year into their marriage, unable to distinguish between toxicity and mere misunderstandings, Sakthi decides to part ways with Siva. The story unfolds as the couple navigates their separation, and whether they ultimately proceed with divorce forms the emotional climax. A hilarious face-off between an online feminist and a pseudo-Periyarist, the film offers a witty, heartfelt take on modern relationships, packed with laughter, drama, and emotion.

Shattered after his love, Deepthi, marries another man, software engineer Sakthivel attempts suicide. He is stopped by a message from his Facebook friend, Anandhi, who claims to be messaging him from beyond the grave. After confirming Anandhi's tragic death, Sakthi accepts her presence, falls in love, and marries her spirit. Their blissful union is threatened when Anandhi decides to leave, feeling she is no longer useful to him. The climax asks if their spiritual love can endure eternity.

Pralay is a gripping tale of love, friendship, and justice set against the backdrop of political corruption and administrative failure. When Sonal, a foundry worker's daughter, is brutally wronged by the powerful, her family's pursuit of justice exposes the deep rot within the system. Pushed to the edge, they must choose between silent suffering or becoming the storm that shakes the system.

Cherukkanum Pennum is a Romantic Thriller based on the lives of IT Professionals Balu and Ritha. The film delicately portrays the unexpected events that unfold shortly after their marriage, testing the depth of their love.

A wealthy young entrepreneur, haunted by dreams of a mysterious woman, falls in love only to face betrayal. In his thirst for revenge, he marries her innocent sister, turning love into a cruel weapon that destroys them all.

Three aspiring filmmakers from a humble brick kiln background set out to prove their talent. After their first village drama is dismissed, they reinvent themselves. What begins as a daring YouTube channel stunt soon spirals into danger, loss, and shocking revelation all part of their bold second film. This unexpected, twisted narrative ultimately wins over a producer, marking the true beginning of their filmmaking journey.

Koluru hasnt performed its yearly Kona (buffalo) sacrifice, leaving the village uneasy. Narayana, a wandering astrologer with his robot Jogi, is drawn into the villages fears and power struggles. As the ritual nears, secrets surface. Will Narayana dare to face the truth behind the sacrifice?

Well Done Aai is a heartwarming comedy about a spirited mother on a mission to find the perfect bride for her son. Armed with endless schemes, witty twists, and boundless affection, she turns every challenge into laughter-filled moments.
Lucknow ki shaadi or London ka pyaar  kaun karega Salma ka relationship status change? Let the chaos begin!

Durga, an ordinary housewife living in a large ancestral home, returns one day to find her family and house hijacked by four deadly terrorists seeking shelter. Realising her family is in grave danger, Durga understands she has only one choice: fight. Driven by the primal instinct of a mother and a powerful woman, Durga decides to take matters into her own hands, transforming into a warrior to end the nightmare and save her family.

Brat is a gripping tale of a young man named Kristy who is driven to defy his father, Constable Mahadevaiah, and his unwavering commitment to honesty. The film explores the thrilling and unpredictable journey that unfolds from the tensions between youthful ambitions and the principles of a righteous parent.

A boy struggles to express his love to a girl he loves deeply, but she fails to understand his mental state. The burning flame in a loving heart seeks solitude and comfort, making it difficult to express emotions through words.

An intense love story brews between Deva and Bindhu as a masked man calling himself GOD shakes the city with a wave of brutal serial killings. As fear spreads and emotions deepen, their two disparate journeys slowly edge toward a collision. The story revolves around the dramatic events of this convergence and the shocking secrets of what happened.

Pravas tells the heartfelt story of Tino, a young boy from a humble village in Gujarat who dreams of visiting Ahmedabad after hearing enchanting tales about the city. When his school plans a trip there, Tinos excitement knows no bounds--until his family`s financial struggles force him to stay behind. As his friends embark on the journey, Tino experiences his own emotional voyage, one that explores hope, longing, and the strength to find joy amidst hardship.
MA Previous is a Chhattisgarhi movie starring Raj Verma, Deepak Sahu and Aradhana Sahu in prominent roles. It is directed by Pranav Jha.
Cristina Kathirvelan starring Kaushik Ram, Pratibha and others. Directed by SJN Alex Pandian.
Directed by Rahul Ravindran, The Girlfriend is a feature film starring Rashmika Mandanna and Dheekshith Shetty.
Pagal Kanavu is a Tamil movie starring Faisal Raj, Athira Santhosh, Karate Rajan, Cool Suresh and Shakeela in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Faisal Raj.

In a tale of rediscovery, a couple plagued by constant disagreements is forced back under the same roof. What begins as a tense arrangement slowly gives way to moments of unexpected warmth, as they uncover a hidden truth and a silent act of love that forever changes their bond. Set against the backdrop of family ties and everyday life, Kadhipatta is a tender story that proves that even the smallest gestures can leave the deepest marks.

DDD is a film of social concern where a protagonist initially seeks revenge for his family's injustice against the poor. After meeting a police officer from a similar background, he realises his violent approach is wrong and allies with the officer. Together, they wage a final war to dismantle the system perpetrating the injustice done to him and the ongoing social injustice.

After returning to his village from the city, the hero is drawn into a dual crisis: young girls preparing for marriage are mysteriously dying, and the village Sarpanch is trying to illegally seize the land belonging to the local goddess's temple. The hero, who originally planned a photoshoot, finds himself driven by a mission. The story follows how he confronts the corrupt Sarpanch and ultimately saves the girls from the mysterious pre-marriage deaths.

When a series of IVF-born infants are afflicted with severe, unexplained conditions, the protagonist, a cop unravels a dark conspiracy involving blacklisted steroids, anonymous donors, and compromised hospitals - as he hunts an invisible criminal who turns hope into horror.

In the year 2003, three teenagers- Adnan, Chandrika, and Rathore. They not only forge a fake marksheet but also forge a crazy friendship. Little do they know that the repercussions of their innocent mistake will shake the entire city. A funny, whacky, thrilling rollercoaster that celebrates youth!

Abhanga Tukaram is a soulful Marathi film based on the life and literature of Sant Tukaram. It portrays his fight for reform, his struggle for equality through his works, and the unwavering support of his wife, Avali. Blending poetry, music, and emotion, the film celebrates faith, love, and timeless values.
Jignesh and Lalo are dishonest and lazy friends who dont care about life. Because of this, they find themselves stuck in a bad situation, one that changes their lives forever.

When widowed father Shantanu discovers his late wifes handwritten recipes, he begins a heartfelt journey to reconnect with his estranged daughter. With the help of chef Rita, his kitchen becomes a place of healing, laughter, and the courage to open his heart to a new beginning.

This film is centred on the belief that Lord Hanumans sacred mace (gada) still rests hidden in Anjanadri Hill, protected by the hero Anji and his guru. The conflict begins when villains attempt to steal the mace, succeeding only through the betrayal of Anji's own friend. The story follows Anji's journey to recover the stolen divine artefact and return it to the Anjanadri temple, protecting this ancient legacy.

The Great Pre-Wedding Show taps into the modern world of pre-wedding shoots, blending laughter, drama, and emotion. The film is an entertaining celebration of life and love, ultimately telling a beautiful love story.

Vinod, a disciplined young man with a routine life, faces an unexpected nightmare. What begins as a quest for justice turns into a chaotic, hilarious, and heartfelt journey filled with satire, emotion, and laughter. Innocent is a family comedy drama that reminds us how one viral moment can change everything.

A yoga expert named Vihari returns to India, where he encounters Brundha and discovers they were lovers in a past life. Bound by a centuries-old curse, their journey explores destiny, reincarnation, and the eternal quest for love.
The story of a serial killer, Yeong Hoon, who murdered 11 people, offering a special interview with Seon Joo, a veteran reporter who is desperate for a scoop.
Anal Mazhai is a Tamil movie directed by Ayanarappan A.

Happy Khush Ho Gaya follows Happy, a small-time crook who pretends to be the reincarnation of a rich villager, Khushal Singh. The plan works until Khushals estranged wife, Naseebo, returns, trapping Happy in a web of lies and chaos.

On his way to a long-overdue drinking party with two friends, Anish receives an unexpected call from Anjana, a past lover visiting the city. Their decision to meet sets the stage for an evening of easy banter, reopened wounds, and difficult choices. When an unexpected turn of events forces Anish to seek help, the limits of his friendships are tested. Set against the backdrop of a conservative city, Ithiri Neram explores the complex dynamics of enduring love and uncertain friendships.
Parrisu is a Tamil movie starring Jaanvekaa Subramaniam, Kiran Pradeep, Jai Bala and Sachu in prominent roles. It is directed by Kala Alluri.
