A young American soldier and a German psychologist must race against time to help an American psychiatrist uncover the truth behind a high-ranking Nazi officer before the Nuremberg trials begin.

A hopeless romantic, Ajith believes love is movie magic, but his life is a series of misunderstandings. After a fiasco, his parents force him to work at a matrimony agency. There, he clashes with his pragmatic boss, Anjali, who believes love is pure logic. Their dynamic forces Ajith to learn that love must be earned. By the time he understands this truth, love is gone. Years later, destiny offers him one last chance. Will love wait this time?

Kathiravan raises three orphans, including Sathya, grooming them to unknowingly run his illegal mushroom drug empire. After seizing control of the business by murdering his former boss, he earns the vengeful wrath of the widow, Radha. The conflict escalates when Kathiravan, threatened by Varsha's (Sathya's love interest) plan to transfer her estate to the workers, manipulates them against her. With Varshas life in danger, Sathya and Radha must finally confront the man who betrayed them, leading to a climactic reckoning.
Love You Muddu is a Kannada movie starring Siddu N., Reshmaa L., Rajesh Natranga and Tabla Nani in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Kumaar L.

A middle-aged, failed writer stuns everyone when he boldly declares that he is about to commit the perfect crime. What follows is a gripping cat-and-mouse chase as a determined cop and his team race against time to stop a chillingly well-planned series of murders.
Roshagni is an action revenge drama featuring breathtaking real stunts. The film's protagonist is driven by a quest for vengeance, navigating a story filled with intense action and drama.

This is a heartwarming story about four young boys who embark on an epic adventure toward their mythical "Dreaming Well." The film focuses entirely on the theme of pure childhood nostalgia and the unbreakable bonds of youth.

One Last Ride is a hilarious and wild road trip to Goa with no money, no phones, and no GPS. This journey is filled with chaotic fun as four friends with different personalities embark on an impossible trip to fulfil a final wish. Their car, a character in itself, gives them trouble like never before, leading to unforgettable memories and the uncovering of one shocking truth.
Bhai: Sleeper Cell, a film that transcends boundaries and delves into the core of suspense and drama.
Two Gopis from a remote village called Gopalapuram plan a trip to Goa in the hopes of landing some Gopikas. What they didn't expect was that Krishna would also join.

John Paul is a leading Motivational Speaker who leads peaceful family life with his wife and two children. One day John met a man in his fearful dream. Ironically his son met that same man in real life.The real story begins with that twist.
A crime journalist's life is forever changed when she interviews a convicted felon who claims to have committed a heinous crime, and he takes a shocking step to prove his guilt.
Three two-wheeler mechanics find themselves caught in a mystery that changes everything.

Wandering without a job, Siddhu falls for Shanmukhi. When she demands he get a job before considering his proposal, his desperate attempt to secure employment leads to the tragic ruin of both his life and his family`s.
Hi Zindagi is a Hindi movie starring Gaurav Singh Rajput and Garima Singh in prominent roles. It is directed by Ajay Ram.

t: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
d: The Four Horsemen return along with a new generation of illusionists performing mind-melding twists, turns, surprises, and magic unlike anything ever captured on film.

Three nights waited a hundred years to give birth to the Trighori, and three lives are ensnared in this vicious cycle. As reality begins to blur, one question remains: is this a perfectly crafted trap, or is something far more sinister at play?
Oru Start Action Story is a Malayalam movie directed by T S Arun Giladi. The film features the director himself, T S Arun Giladi, alongside Deepa Prabha and D L Baburaj in pivotal roles.

t: J-Hope Tour: Hope on the Stage - The Movie
d: J-hope performs songs from Jack In The Box, Hope on the Street Vol. 1, debuts "Killin' It Girl (Solo)", and performs BTS classics. Features collaborations with Jin, Jung Kook, and Crush, plus behind-the-scenes footage.

In Bijapur, an orphaned auto driver falls in love and follows a girl into college, where playful revenge against bullies takes many twists, yet can the wisdom of the citys monuments turn conflict into love, respect, and harmony?
Feel the Love, Feel the Music, Feel the Magic!

In Bhopal, Krishna and Seetha`s love is shattered when Krishna is entangled with his coworker, Radhika. A heartbroken Seetha retaliates by feigning interest in his boss. Krishna realises his mistake when he discovers Radhika is married and desperately seeks forgiveness. Seetha gives him one chance, and the couple begins a journey of healing, ultimately forging a stronger, deeper bond.

Ik Tere Kar K follows Jass and Swaran, a devoted couple who leave everything behind to build a new life in Canada. When tragedy strikes their family, love is tested, faith is broken, and forgiveness becomes their greatest strength. Through selfless sacrifice and rediscovered bonds, they learn that true family isnt defined by blood, but by the love that endures every trial.

Hikora is a psychological drama where a director`s life begins to mirror the script he`s writing. Guided by his psychiatrist, he`s drawn into a haunting overlap between reality and fiction, where two climaxes. One in life and one in art blur the boundaries of truth, creation, and madness.
Two spirited friends embark on an unexpected journey. Their adventure tests courage, hope, and the bonds of friendship.

Kaantha is a period drama set in 1950s Madras, directed by Selvamani Selvaraj. Featuring Dulquer Salmaan, Samuthirakani, and Bhagyashri Borse, the film brings a pan-Indian cinematic experience to life.

Set in the heart of Bastar, this Chhattisgarhi film weaves a powerful tale of love and conflict. Amid the backdrop of Naxal-affected forests, two young hearts find hope, courage, and humanity in a world torn by fear and ideology. This gripping story blends emotion, realism, and the unique spirit of Chhattisgarh.

2020 Delhi portrays the Delhi riots of February 24, 2020, sparked by anti-CAA protests during President Trump`s visit. Akshay and Javed, with opposing views, join forces with Radheshyam, a Pakistani Hindu refugee, to combat conspiracies and save the city, showcasing unity amid chaos.

Soori, a lower-caste man, returns from prison, earns respect, and falls in love with Kamala. His Kabaddi victories anger upper-caste rivals led by Kashi Babu. Clashes of class and caste over pride and power escalate into arson and tragedy, revealing the dark truths of Sooris past.

It`s a tale of Simhabettu Village, where Satya, a local boy is politically influenced by the ruling party MLA and works for him. But, Satya ignores the unsolved conflict of the Simhabettu village, until it affects him personally. So, he decides to solve it and saves the village esteem.
Oru Wayanadan Kadha is a Malayalam movie directed by Ameer Basheer.

After years as a cycle vendor, Bhanudas finally buys his dream bike, only for it to be tragically lost in a bomb blast. His desperate quest to recover it plunges him into a shocking world of corruption. With the help of an investigative journalist, Bhanudas fights back, ultimately exposing the deceitful system.

A feared gangster, Poongavanam, rules Chennai for over 25 years without a single FIR against him. When a suo motu case targets him, the government assigns IPS officer Thigazh Bharathi on an undercover mission to dismantle his empire amidst betrayal, violence, and power struggles.
An unsuspecting cab driver takes up a petty job, only to fall into the deadly trap of a ruthless gangster. Now, he must fight for survival or accept that he was born to be hunted

Gatha Vaibhava is a fantasy drama that weaves together history, mythology, and destiny. When Purathan and Adhunika meet in the present, they embark on a mystical journey through their past lives from the divine realms of Devaloka to Vasco da Gama's voyage and the coastal lands of pre-independence Karnataka. As echoes of the past resurface, they must unravel their fate. Will love endure across lifetimes, or is history doomed to repeat itself?

The story follows a relentless detective _whose personal losses pull him deep into an investigation far more complex and dangerous than it first appears. With every step, he gets closer to the truth that challenges everything he stands for. What's next?

The film centres on Agani Mohanty, an ideal teacher whose motto is that education is a service. Years after helping his students achieve high-ranking government posts, his former student Ramesh seeks him out, only to find Agani Sir living destitute on the roadside, abandoned by his family. Ramesh takes in his mentor. When Ramesh is falsely implicated in a land scam, Agani Sir and another former student, Murali, work together to prove his innocence. The story concludes with Agani Sir receiving the President`s Award, confirming the powerful theme: ``A teacher is the real God for the Student.``

This family drama unfolds around a tender love story shaped by the weight of sacrifice. Blending romance with deep-rooted emotions, it follows how love, duty, and difficult choices reshape the lives of those at its center. Though the finer details remain under wraps, the film promises an intimate journey through relationships, resilience, and the bonds that hold a family together.

Akshay finds himself in a hilarious mess when he falls in love with two girls at the same time, without either of them knowing. To make things worse, his strict father is completely against love. Now, Akshay must juggle both sides, hide the truth, and somehow escape the chaos hes created.
Agra is a story of a boy who goes through life's frustrations and dreams of living a happy life with a wife in his new room.

In the dense forests of Dang, Gujarat, lies the lore of Vaghmata, a forest goddess who grants wishes. After a mysterious tragedy in 1999, the goddess vanishes. Years later, a modern-day Tantric, Rahu, seeks her lost power. Standing in his way are Devbapu and R.F.O. Veer Purohit, who fight to protect their village from Rahu and his Vetal. Will the Goddess answer their call? From Kamakhya to Dang, Maa Vaghmata unravels an untamed tale of faith and fear.

Set against the backdrop of the 1962 Sino-Indian War, 120 Bahadur tells the true story of Major Shaitan Singh Bhati, PVC and his 120 brave soldiers of Charlie Company. Outnumbered and outgunned in the icy heights of the Himalayas, they choose valor over retreat, holding their ground against 3,000 enemy troops. With rifles, bayonets, and unshakable courage, they fight a legendary battle for honor, brotherhood, and the nation.

A stirring tale of sacrifice and heroism, this is the untold legacy of India`s bravest.

A string of sudden police officer murders in three areas prompts the deployment of Crime Branch Officer Randeep Sen to secure an upcoming police event. As Randeep investigates the killings, he uncovers a disturbing, strange incident tied to the motive. Randeep, an officer who honours his oath, must use his wits and strength to protect the force and bring the killer to justice.
Follows an ex-soldier who finds gold in the Lapland wilderness. As he attempts to transport the treasure to the city, he encounters a ruthless SS officer and German soldiers

When Chotu`s surprise party for his don father ends in tragedy, he inherits the criminal empire and uncovers his uncle Murthy`s deceit. Meanwhile, Kittu, a struggling cab driver pretending to be deaf, becomes entangled in danger after unknowingly helping twin murderers.

Comondra Alien follows John, a sharp and dedicated police officer whose latest case takes an unimaginable turn. What begins as an investigation into a series of temple-linked disappearances soon unravels into something far beyond human understanding. As John digs deeper into a bizarre murder and claims of divine possession, he uncovers a shocking truth, aliens may be living among us.
Yellow is a Tamil movie starring Poornima Ravi, Vaibhav Murugesan, Sai Prasanna and Namitha Krishnan Moorthy in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Hari Mahadevan.

The ancient Rajkothi of Raja Rajuthi has become a place of death for the people of Bengal. In the bungalow, an old man works as a caretaker. An elderly girl named Chitra falls in love with a young psycho man named Rocky. Rocky gets Chitra pregnant but he ends up killing her.

After a charming meet-cute leads to an arranged marriage, a wife`s suspicions about her husband`s strange behaviour unravel their seemingly perfect relationship, leading to a shocking revelation that forces them to redefine their understanding of love and commitment.

In a drought-stricken village, Bhoomayya transforms barren land into a thriving forest, bringing prosperity to his people. Years later, his granddaughter Haritha returns as a teacher to promote conservation. But peace shatters when a corporate giant targets the forests resources, sparking a battle between ancestral heritage and government-declared assets.

When writer Jeba is murdered at midnight, the calm of an upscale apartment complex shatters. Inspector Magudapathi, known for his unorthodox methods, delves into the residents' secrets to uncover the truth. Amid the chaos, Adhi`s growing bond with his mother's therapist, Meera, complicates everything. Mufti Police is a tense thriller where every neighbor hides a motive and the truth is darker than anyone expects.
Set in the multicultural hills of Panchthar, Nepal, the film takes you on a heartfelt journey shaped by love, community, and the quiet strength of human connection.

440 crores stolen. Seven days to get it back.

A game of greed, betrayal and intrigue culminates in an explosive climax in this story of a greedy man, a conniving woman, and an uncanny guy with a bag full of tricks.

t: Hind Ki Chadar - Guru Ladho Re
d:
In 1664, Sri Guru Tegh Bahadur ji was anointed as the Ninth Light of Guru Nanak. At the time, Emperor Aurangzeb ruled India and sought to forcibly convert the nation into Dar-ul-Islam. The oppressed Brahmins, led by Kripa Ram, turned to Guru Tegh Bahadur ji for help. Moved by their plight, the Guru agreed to represent their cause, accompanied by his devoted disciples Bhai Mati Das, Bhai Dayal Das and Bhai Sati Das.

What followed became a turning point in Indian history, a timeless symbol of dharma, truth, the defence of religious freedom and human rights.
Amidst the stillness of village life, Avani's heart carries a storm. Torn between what she feels and what the world expects, she learns to endure love, loss, and sacrifice in silence.

Based on the true story of Sr. Rani Maria, this tale depicts the trials and tribulations of a woman who rose above the boundaries of her religion, realized the universal oneness, and committed her life to women`s empowerment.

Smart Sunbai is a comedy thriller murder mystery. While the film takes a humorous approach, it also carries a strong element of suspense. Through the clash between urban and rural female characters, the story delivers both chaos and entertainment.
Bapache Putache Navim is a Konkani movie starring Sweedal D`Souza and Dayan D'Souza in prominent roles. it is written and directed by Stany Bela.

Social media has become an inseparable part of modern life. Technological advancements provide unprecedented access to information, putting details about influential personalities, businesses, and even highly confidential matters at our fingertips.

A chilling murder, a young witness, and two unlikely heroes pulled into a perilous game. With a ruthless mafia closing in, they embark on a daring mission to protect the innocent and hunt down those responsible. This action-packed thriller delivers tension, courage and nonstop excitement from start to finish.

A crew of criminals executes the perfect heist, stealing a priceless liquor bottle from a notorious gang leader. But what begins as a clean getaway spirals into a storm of betrayal, bloodshed, and long-buried secrets. As the truth unravels, they discover the real battle isnt for the loot its for survival.

Youth possesses the strength in its wings to soar and conquer the skies. It is the youth that rebels against the system. The movie Uut-Bhavanancha Udrek tells the story of Sharanam's struggle against the system, along with a love story. This film embodies struggle, love, determination, optimism and inspiration for young people.

This story follows the life of a person responsible for 36 killings, a criminal highly sought by the police. The film begins when he surrenders himself, confessing his numerous crimes and, more importantly, revealing the reasons behind them.
Lokkhikantopur Local movie deals with the life ordeals of house helps Kalyani, Malati and Saraswati, visiting three different families in Kolkata.

Set across Gujarat and overseas, it follows three courageous women who join forces to fight injustice. What begins as helping people in need soon propels them into an impossible mission, one that tests their strength, unity, and determination to bring justice full circle.
When two inseparable best friends propose to share one man as husband, love, loyalty, and ambition collide in a bold and humorous experiment that could unite them or tear them apart.
Three frustrated husbands seek freedom from their dull marriages. A wild idea promises escape and excitement. But what follows is anything but expected.

Greeshma, daughter of actress Manohari, loves her colleague Sreekuttan, but his parents oppose the match. Influenced by her friend Nissa, she considers businessman Prem and grows close to him. Trusting him, she leaves with her gold, only to be cheated and pulled into a police case. Her father rescues her, and Annamma Teacher later fixes her marriage with Sreekuttan.

In a world asleep in the web's darkness, one man awakens like the eyes of the night. Driven by anger and purpose, he confronts hidden evils online, seeking justice and redemption in a society lost to digital shadows.

Srinu, a directionless 30-year-old from Machilipatnam, longs for love but fears his flaws make him unworthy. His world shifts when he falls for Manaswini, the disciplined, ideal girl-next-door. Determined to win her, he reshapes himself, sparking confusion in both families. But when her disapproving father challenges Srinu to prove his worth within a month, a string of misfortunes makes him look even more foolish. Caught between her devoted father and the man she loves, Manaswini must decide where her heart truly lies, while Srinu struggles to prove he is more than the fool everyone believes him to be.

Lucky, a wedding photographer, finds himself in a chaotic love triangle during a pre-wedding shoot. The bride falls for him, fully aware that her best friend, the makeup artist, is already deeply in love with Lucky. What follows is a wild tug-of-war of hearts, a full platter of love, drama, chaos, and raw emotions.

In the misty hills of Kaattukunnu, Mlaathi Chedathi and Peeyoos struggle to survive unforeseen challenges as the chronicles of Kuriyachan, a multifaceted businessman and outlaw, blur the line between myth, longing, and reckoning, revealing that he forever rules the hills.

Premalo Rendosaari is a village-based story centred on two childhood friends who fall deeply in love. When their parents refuse to accept their relationship, the couple faces numerous problems. The film follows the lovers' challenging journey to overcome obstacles and uniquely win their love.

Karl Marx, a middle-class man with a simple dream of owning farmland, lives a routine life with his outspoken wife and two children. When an unexpected opportunity finally brings his dream within reach, chaos and pressure push him into a frantic, heartfelt journey. Middle Class follows his race against time to change his life.
Chakram and Lakshmi are medical students who fall in love with each other. However, when Chakram gets diagnosed with cancer, he leaves her and moves to another city.

When writer Jeba is murdered at midnight, the calm of an upscale apartment complex shatters. Inspector Magudapathi, known for his unorthodox methods, delves into the residents' secrets to uncover the truth. Amid the chaos, Adhi's growing bond with his mother's therapist, Meera, complicates everything. Theeyavar Kulai Nadunga is a tense thriller where every neighbor hides a motive and the truth is darker than anyone expects.

Raju Weds Rambai is inspired by a real story of a carefree band drummer whose love for a compounders daughter triggers a clash of ego and honour, turning their sweet village romance into an emotional journey filled with conflict, pain, and ultimately redemption.
A young woman in the software industry grapples with heartbreak, divorce, and depression, but a compassionate driver offers hope and a brighter future during a taxi ride.

Now demonized as the Wicked Witch of the West, Elphaba lives in exile in the Ozian forest, while Glinda resides at the palace in Emerald City, reveling in the perks of fame and popularity. As an angry mob rises against the Wicked Witch, she'll need to reunite with Glinda to transform herself, and all of Oz, for good.

The musical romantic comedy Last Stop Khanda follows Kiran, a man secretly in love with his best friend, also named Kiran. When she suffers a heartbreak, he sees his chance to finally confess his feelings. The film asks if his unspoken love can escape the friend zone.

Murali secretly loves Thenmozhi, but when he returns from Singapore, he finds her married and unaware that she is carrying his child. To help him move on, his friend Prabhu gets him married to his sister Malathi. Years later, a tragic accident reveals the truth about Thenmozhi's son, reviving old village tensions and putting a pregnant Malathi at risk, leading to an emotional climax.
Ujaan Yatra is a Bengali movie starring Sharmistha Mukherjee and Moubani Sorcar in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Somnath Sen.
Sianti is a Khasi movie starring Shongdor Thabah and Roping Lawriniang in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Roping Lawriniang.
Nache Dulha Gali Gali is a Bhojpuri movie starring Rani Chatterjee and Mahesh Acharya in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Vijay Prakash Mourya.

When a young boy visits the city with his elder sister, she mysteriously goes missing. As the desperate brother searches for her, he uncovers shocking secrets that lead him on a path of truth, vengeance, and justice.

A crew of five amateur thieves reunite for one final score in a village brimming with elections. With no experience and only a reckless plan, things dont go as expected.

Will they make it out, or will the village remember them only as five fools who gambled with fate?

Rajini and Maina elope using a stolen thali for a quick wedding, unaware it carries a tragic past. When Maina becomes possessed by Ponnarasi's vengeful spirit, Rajini joins forces with friends and a priest to uncover the truth and save her.

Lucky, known as the unluckiest man alive, reaches his breaking point after his mother`s death. Just when he is about to give up, a group of quirky ghosts appears and gives him a new sense of direction, along with an unexpected chance at love with Nidhi. When he learns that the ghosts died during a past financial crisis, Lucky joins forces with them to plan a chaotic, comedic bank heist that could finally bring them peace. Whether he can turn his misfortune into a miracle is where the real fun begins.

In a city drowning in unregulated pharmaceutical addiction, Hafiz, a small-time tablet peddler from the slums, stumbles into the dark empire ruled by Ustad the cold, calculating kingpin who controls addicts and criminals alike. As Hafiz rises through this dangerous world, ambition pushes him toward a deadly clash of power and loyalty. Caught between survival and betrayal, hes forced to confront the mentor who shaped him, setting the stage for a high-stakes battle within the citys shadowy pharma underworld.

Nirdhar is a gripping Marathi social drama where five college students uncover a painful truth about their own families involvement in the tragedy that destroyed their professor's village. Struggling between loyalty and justice, they stage their own kidnapping to force a confession. In court, their revelation exposes how corruption begins at home and sparks a movement for truth and accountability. It is a story of courage, guilt, and choosing what is right no matter the cost.

Mani, a determined gangster seeking revenge for his brothers death, sets out to kill Jagan, a feared local don. But when his trusted ally Gopi jeopardizes the plan, Mani abandons the mission to protect him. Forced into hiding, Mani finally reveals the painful truth of how his brother was killed six months ago, setting the stage for a tense journey fueled by loyalty, loss and vengeance.

A corrupt political leader rules through fear, silencing anyone who stands in his way. When his cruelty tears apart the lives of an innocent couple, their suffering exposes how far his abuse of power has spread. Determined to stop him, an honest political leader joins hands with a sincere police officer. Together, they take on the dangerous task of uncovering his crimes and ending his grip over peoples lives.

Set against the nostalgic backdrop of the 80s and 90s, the comedy-drama Paatashaala beautifully captures the bond between students and teachers and the deep love for their village and forest in the Malnad region. Inspired by real-life incidents, the film is a heartwarming journey back to childhood.

Ayyappanum Vapuranum portrays the lives of Thampurattis, royal women who lost power, wealth, and pride yet remained silent and faithful. Facing poverty, neglect, and the collapse of traditions, they endured with resilience. Ultimately, through unwavering faith, they find liberation and divine grace, highlighting the strength of devotion in their lives.
A struggling social media influencer visits a cremation ground and discovers a way to use ghosts to become famous. However, not all spirits have good intentions.

The powerful four estates Legislature, Executive, Judiciary and media. Some People working in these systems misuse their powers for their personal fulfilment. Bringing out the Naked in the Dark of Such people by a Dare and Dashing lady Lucky.
Rita's quiet life in Pondicherry turns chaotic when her family becomes entangled in a violent gang war. With her sharp mind and courage, she must outwit the gangsters to keep her loved ones safe
In a sleepy hill town in northeast India, a lonely mother tries to reconnect with her estranged policeman son by channelling her inner detective to help him solve a murder
Some souls are meant to collide. Some love stories are destined to burn brighter.

A blind man`s solitude unravels when strangers enter his life with hidden motives. What begins as deception slowly turns into something real, forcing them all to face whether trust built on lies can ever survive the truth.

Behind every revolution are mothers, children, sisters, and ordinary people who sacrifice everything for the right to live equally under the law. 'Janata Bar' tells the story of one such woman - and her fight for justice.

Nallapaadan, a poor farmer from a lower caste, is highly devoted to his deity Ondimuni, who he believes saved his son. He wishes to sacrifice his prized goat as an offering, but a feud between two upper-caste individuals has halted the annual festival at the temple dedicated to Ondimuni.

Will Nallapaadan be able to fulfil his wish amidst this conflict?
A stylish romantic entertainer filled with love, drama, and unexpected twists. Get ready to fall in love, laugh, and lose yourself in the madness of Flirt!

A story that began with everyone's sweet memories of 1990, a Rayalaseema love story that began with love and ended with hatred. Nani, who loves his beloved sweetie more than his life, wins.. A father who thinks about caste wins... When he thought that nothing is greater than love, did Nani's love win..?

A child's curiosity about "What is God?" evolves into a lifelong search for the meaning of the Universe, and he ultimately finds his answers in one essential element of human anatomy, the spine. Taath Kana is a captivating story of a man on a mission, Dr. P. S. Ramani, a celebrated neuro-spinal surgeon who, with his PLIF Ramani Technique, stands tall in the field of modern medical innovation. The film drives home an eternal truth: nothing is impossible for the human spirit, and no human achievement is meaningful unless it serves others.

Kalavari is a family comedy centered around rural weddings and traditions, capturing the charm and humor of village life. The story follows relatable characters with Rajeshwari Kharat and Rahul Darade in the lead, bringing laughter, emotion, and a fresh take on love and celebrations in every scene.
In an afterlife where souls have one week to decide where to spend eternity, a woman is faced with an impossible choice between the man she spent her life with and her first love, who died young.

Haati Haati Paa Paa is a timeless story exploring a form of love that transcends romance. It uncovers the vital, unseen bonds built on respect, duty, and spiritual connection relationships that sustain life like the roots of a tree. The characters strive to maintain this delicate equilibrium, learning that love is about finding the perfect balance of care and respect to keep their ties meaningful amid the flow of life.

t: Not All Movies Are The Same: Dual
d: A man discovers a bag of cash in a remote lake, and a series of horrific events begins to unfold in his life.

Acharya Sri Shankara, born in 788 CE in Kalady, Kerala, was the philosopher who revived Advaita Vedanta. Renouncing the world at a young age, he travelled across India, wrote influential commentaries, debated scholars, and established four major monasteries to spread his teachings. According to tradition, he disappeared at age 32 near the Kedarnath temple. This film captures his remarkable life and legacy.

In a once-happy family, a neglected pet dog becomes infected with rabies and turns violent, leading to a tragedy that destroys the entire household. Shunned by the villagers and left with a dark past, the house sits abandoned for years until a doctor unknowingly buys it. But the dog's vengeful spirit still lingers, ready to strike at anyone who dares to step inside.

A paranormal research team investigates a haunted mansion, only to face terrifying supernatural forces. With the help of an Aghori, the main character uncovers the spirits tragic past and helps them find salvation.

Set in the Western Ghats of 1947, Kaala's Rebellion follows Kaala, a young man from a marginalised community burdened by his father's unfulfilled dream of owning land. Oppressed by a powerful landlord and rigid caste barriers, he fights to claim his identity and future. When peaceful paths fail, Kaala rises in violent revolt, turning his struggle for land into a battle for dignity and survival.

On a pursuit to save his father's printing press in the heart of Purani Delhi, a man becomes a disciple of a revered poet and falls in love with his daughter. Torn between his love and honoring his mentor, he must make a choice that could change his life forever.

Satya, a small-town family man struggling to save his failing jewellery shop, sets out to meet a friend who promised him financial help. But when his bike breaks down deep inside a forest, he stumbles upon a mysterious woman living alone in a rundown house. As Satya tries to find his way back, he is drawn into her unsettling world, where nothing is as it seems. Sarangi unfolds the suspense of who she is, why she lives in isolation, and whether Satya will ever make it back to his family.

Victoria, a young beautician in a small-town parlour, finds her ordinary day spiralling into something unsettling, pushing her toward a moment of bold, life-changing conviction, while an unruly sacrificial rooster becomes an unlikely spiritual witness.

In a serene Goa restaurant overlooking the sea, Anvi waits to meet a naval officer her father has chosen for her. He sees a future with her, but Anvi quietly carries the truth that she's already in love with someone else. Graceful yet strong-minded, she turns down his proposal with honesty, and the story then unfolds from her perspective, revealing the choices and emotions that shape her journey.
BP 180 is a Tamil movie starring Tanya S Ravichandran, Daniel Balaji and K. Bhagyaraj in prominent roles. It is directed and written by JP.
After Operation London Cafe is a bilingual movie starring Kaveesh Shetty, Megha Shetty, Shivani Surve, and Virat Madake in prominent roles. It is directed by Sadagara Raghavendra.

Me No Pause Me Play is a heartwarming and empowering story about women navigating lifes transitions, rediscovering their strength, and redefining identity beyond age. It delivers a powerful message of awareness and acceptance around menopause.

Fakiriyat traces the life of Gurumai, a saint who lived simply yet carried immense spiritual wisdom. After a life-changing accident awakened memories of her past births and the practice of Kriya Yoga, she set out to share this knowledge. Despite humiliation, opposition, and attempts to push her out of Kashi, she continued her mission with the blessings of great masters. Fakiriyat becomes a story of faith, fearlessness, and a seeker who turned into a guiding light for many.

Vellakuthira follows Kathir, a greedy man whose hunger for wealth drags his family into a financial crisis. Forced to flee after a violent confrontation, Kathir, his wife Kayal, and their son move to their ancestral village, hoping for a fresh start. But old habits die hard - when Kathir discovers a local herbal drink with great market value, temptation strikes again. As he chases profit and the villagers fight against exploitation and neglect, the story unfolds into a gripping tale of greed, redemption, and survival.

Gunasekaran, a middle-class family man turned cab operator, finds his life upended when his car is misused by a corrupt cop linked to a serious crime. Suddenly pulled into a dangerous web of police, politics, and false accusations, he is forced to fight for his survival in Madurai. With Anbu stepping in to help, the story follows their tense struggle to uncover the truth and escape a trap set by powerful forces.

Sapno Ki Udaan tells the inspiring story of village children who pursue education outside their remote hometown and return to uplift their community. Realizing the power of knowledge, they strive to establish the first school in their village.
Kalika explores the deeply sensitive theme of mental abuse, featuring Raushni Srivastava, Raja Guru, and Saarrh Kkashyap in key roles. The film is directed by Raushni Srivastava.

t: Seventeen World Tour New in Japan: Live Viewing
d:
Celebrating their 10th anniversary, Seventeen embarks on a monumental new journey with their world tour [NEW], symbolising a fresh start and endless possibilities ahead.

Known as a performance powerhouse, Seventeen delivers dynamic stages, reimagined choreography, and solo performances that spotlight each members growth and artistry.

From Incheon to North America and across Asia, the journey culminates in the Nagoya concert, which will be broadcast live to cinemas worldwide on November 29. Experience Seventeen`s passion, unity, and energy; on the big screen, together with fans around the world.

Madhura Kanakku follows Appu Mash, a devoted math teacher whose life falls apart after he mortgages his home for his daughter's wedding. Betrayed by a former student and shaken by tragedy, he slips into despair. A mysterious stranger's offer creates confusion, but hope eventually returns unexpectedly. The film is a moving story of family, sacrifice, and the unpredictable equations of life.
Five passengers. One shared cab. A shortcut that changes everything. Chaos becomes survival, and no one walks away the same.

t: Rappa Roy & Full Stop Dot Com
d: Rappa, a sharp-witted cartoonist and aspiring journalist, uncovers a dangerous criminal network while investigating a series of crimes in Kolkata. As his investigation deepens, the threats escalate, pulling in his filmmaker friend Tony and actress Dolphin. Together, they must navigate a perilous web of crime, deception, and courage to expose the truth.

In a rural Tamil Nadu village in the mid-1990s, a mother and son clash over one woman's decision to live life on her own terms. The son, newly returned from the city and aspiring to marry into an urban family, insists his mother wear a blouse with her sari; she refuses, unwilling to give up her identity and comfort. Her defiance becomes a quiet act of rebellion against societal expectations, exposing deep-rooted prejudices about class, caste, and bodily autonomy.
One family. One dream. One fight for a single ration card.
A thrilling, sentimental story about a son's love for his single mother, highlighting an unimaginable sacrifice made between friendship and love in this decade.

When a series of mysterious murders in Calicut reveals a chilling pattern, encounter specialist ACP Stallin Joseph uncovers a vengeful psycho killer's deadly plan. As he pieces together the twisted truth, Stallin must make a harrowing choice to become both judge and executioner in his pursuit of justice for a grieving parent.

Set in the heart of dense tribal forests, where ancient Adivasi beliefs and eerie rituals collide with the modern world, unsettling events shake a remote village. A young outsider sets out to uncover the truth behind a centuries-old superstition, but the deeper he ventures, the more he confronts a chilling force that blurs the line between myth and reality.
A story of seven poor villagers who, driven by their obsession with money, ultimately achieve their goals-but a birthday cannot change their destiny.

A supermarket employee with big dreams chooses to live like a middle-class man despite secretly being wealthy. Along with his friends, he gets pulled into a dangerous trap set by a mysterious mastermind. Forced to execute the man's scheme, the group is pushed into a high-stakes chase where every step tests their loyalty, ambition and courage. The real question is, can they outsmart the mastermind and uncover his true motive?

On an ordinary morning, unemployed compulsive gambler Daniel is approached by two enigmatic men determined to enforce the fine print of his happy life. What follows is a tense day of psychological games, where fate, luck, and danger intertwine with every move he makes.

One year has passed since the supernatural nightmare at Freddy Fazbear`s Pizza. Former security guard Mike has kept the truth from his 11-year-old sister, Abby, concerning the fate of her animatronic friends. When Abby sneaks out to reconnect with Freddy, Bonnie, Chica and Foxy, she sets into motion a terrifying series of events that reveal dark secrets about the true origin of Freddy`s.

Nirvaagam Porupalla tracks a cybercrime gang that steals money through deceptive WhatsApp links and fake APK files. As victims fall prey, one man digs deeper into the scam, uncovering a dangerous network hidden behind everyday technology.

A routine Kerala Police inquiry in the quiet village of Kottayikonam takes an unexpected turn when a trail of seemingly minor clues unravels a series of disturbing, long-buried cases. As the officers dig deeper, they find themselves confronting mysteries that have haunted the village for years and a web of brilliant, calculated obstructions designed to block every step of their investigation.

Lakki pursues Chitra for luck until discovering she is deaf, leading to an unexpected bond. As Lahari`s romance collapses under hidden truths, Chitra suddenly disappears, pushing Lakki into a tense search to uncover what happened to her.

Divine tales surrounding the incarnation of Bhagwan Sri Krishna, born in the holy city of Mathura. His arrival on earth marks a mission to destroy evil, protect virtue, and restore balance and righteousness by removing the forces that threaten dharma.
Suppan is a Tamil movie starring Anandha Murugan, Gayatri Rema and Bala Hasan in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Guhanesan Sonaimuthu.

In the film Dharmam, a violent conflict erupts between the lower and upper castes. Amid this clash, the protagonist Karimuttu symbolises the decline of Hindu morality. This central struggle and its moral unravelling form the essence of Dharmam.
The youth who set out as tourists to Khajuraho change their original intent as tourists and eventually fight the government and the multinational company for the good of the villagers.

Vishwaroopini Sri Vasavi is a powerful story of Devi Parvati's incarnation as Vasavi Kanyaka Parameshwari, the guiding light of the Arya Vysya community. The movie is set in ancient times, capturing her spiritual journey of strength and dharma.
Galatta Family is a Tamil movie starring Vemal, Anicka Vikhraman, Thambi Ramaiah, Mottai Rajendran, Anandaraj and Meera Krishnan in prominent roles. It is directed by A. Sarkunam.

After losing their parents in the Tsunami, Kutty and Meena grew up with their grandmother in Kannagi Nagar. When Meena is kidnapped, Kutty believes she has been killed and, pushed by trauma and misguided help, seeks violent revenge. Later, when he discovers that Meena is alive, he travels to Thailand to find her, only to be rejected and urged to change. Unable to cope with her refusal, Kutty tragically ends his own life.
Samaya tells the story of Basava, a village boy who loses everything due to betting, and his journey as he overcomes all odds to reclaim his life.
The story of how the angel of death comes to a selfish and irresponsible young man and tells him that he has 10 days to give his mother a proper final farewell.
A Saga of Power, Vengeance, and True Love.

The year is 2020, and measures against COVID-19 are starting to affect life all over Japan. But for one enthusiastic Tokyoite, the 'new normal' brings a thrilling opportunity. Young salaryman Shinsaku decides to work remotely and moves to a small town on the Sanriku Coast of Miyagi Prefecture, where he rents an empty house from wary landlord Momoka. Surrounded by the stunning nature of Tohoku, Shinsaku spends his days fishing and discovering the charm of his new neighbourhood. But as scars from the 2011 earthquake and tsunami remain fresh, can the territorial locals accept him as one of their own?

A bullied girl transfers schools hoping for peace, but her past trauma isolates her-until she discovers a series of secret letters hidden around the school, leading her on a mysterious quest to uncover the sender's true intent.

Shiva, a quiet mortuary worker, discovers his girlfriend Uma's body one stormy night and spends his final moments grieving beside her. By morning, he is falsely accused of a horrific crime and remains silent under police questioning. When a new officer uncovers the truth, the villagers' rage drives Shiva to flee, triggering a series of events that reveal how an ordinary man can be pushed to become something far darker.

Sree Ayyappan follows a series of events where a terrorist group plots to attack Lord Ayyappan's legacy and his devotees. The film traces how these threats unfold and the forces that rise to protect faith.

Set in Osaka, the story follows siblings Toshiki and Fumiko, orphaned at a young age. Toshiki abandons school to work and raise her, honoring a promise to their late father. As Fumiko's wedding approaches, he hides his emotions behind playful complaints, relieved yet reluctant to let go. But while preparing his speech, he faces a haunting truth: Fumiko carries the memories of a woman who died in a tragic incident.

Set in the mystical hills of Kurangani, this mythological jungle thriller revolves around an ancient Yaali sculpture worshipped by tribal villagers as a divine protector. As tensions rise around its power and significance, the story delivers a striking message: faith isn't just belief; it's protection.

Amid the pressures of modern life, a divided family begins to reconnect when the wise grandfather shares the true story of Veljibhai, a humble man from Kutch whose simple act of kindness blossomed into a lifelong mission for animal welfare. Moved by this forgotten legacy, the young grandson awakens to compassion, guiding the family back to kindness toward all living beings.

It's 2003, and a love story spanning decades has just begun. Highschooler Miu and senior student Minato dream of a life beyond their sleepy Okinawan town, and when MiniDisc jumble brings them together, the pair bond over their shared love of music. Meanwhile, Miu's loyal best friend, Ryusei, quietly looks on as romantic sparks fly. But when Miu follows Minato to Tokyo after graduation, she is soon met by the harsh realities of city life. Unexpected circumstances drive the couple apart, and years later, Miu's daughter is left to piece together the untold stories of her mother's past.
A deadly tiger haunts a peaceful village, and Mukyastha takes it upon himself to end the threat. The chase soon turns personal, pushing him into a fight for survival.

A quiet, emotionally charged drama about Uma, a radio presenter who has raised her son Ninad alone. As Ninad pursues his ambitious career, distance grows between them until an unexpected project brings them back into each other's orbit. What begins as a routine task gradually uncovers buried warmth, unspoken care, and the fragile threads that hold a family together.

A light-hearted family entertainer set in Ambalamukk, the film follows Pappu, an unemployed youth with endless backlogs, as he tries to impress the girl he likes while navigating village chaos and constant family drama.

Celebrating 50 years of India's most iconic film, Sippy Films presents Sholay's original uncut version restored in 4k and Dolby 5.1 by Film Heritage Foundation. Voted the greatest Indian film ever made in a 2002 British Film Institute poll and honored as "Film of the Millenium" by BBC India in 1999, the blockbuster film Sholay directed by Ramesh Sippy premiered at the Minerva cinema hall in Mumbai in 1975 where it ran for five years without a break.

Scripted by the famed writer duo Salim Khan and Javed Akhtar (billed as Salim-Javed), the film described as a curry western, is a landmark of Indian cinema that is a mosaic of all genres: an action-thriller, revenge drama, a comedy and a tragedy set to music, song and dance composed by the iconic music composer R.D. Burman. Inspired by films like Sergio Leone's Once Upon A Time in the West (1968), Akira Kurosawa's Seven Samurai (1954) and John Sturges' film The Magnificent Seven (1960), India's first 70mm film and the first Hindi film to use stereophonic sound featured an ensemble cast that included major stars Sanjeev Kumar, Amitabh Bachchan, Dharmendra, Hema Malini, Jaya Bhaduri and Amjad Khan in an unforgettable performance as the villainous Gabbar Singh.

Nishikata, now a PE teacher at his former island school, receives an unexpected call from Takagi, the childhood classmate who once delighted in teasing him before abruptly moving away ten years earlier. Now studying art in Tokyo and preparing to return to the island, she reopens a chapter Nishikata never resolved, stirring nostalgia, unfinished feelings, and the chance to finally respond to the girl who always stayed one step ahead of him.
Raghu loves Janaki deeply but is unable to express his feelings. Meanwhile, Janaki`s marriage is arranged with Raghu`s brother. Will Raghu go against his brother to win her love?

Ira and Maxi's Darjeeling trip takes a dark turn when they meet the mysterious Dev, whose presence strains their bond. After Maxi disappears, Ira is pulled into a murder investigation tied to Dev's unsettling past. When Maxi is found dead, panic and suspicion escalate, leading to a final twist where a woman posing as a helper is revealed to be part of a secretive organisation, setting the stage for Chapter 2.

In a village trapped by untouchability and superstition, a determined teacher and his students challenge long-standing injustice. Their fight sparks a powerful movement that unites the community and threatens the local oppressor. As hope rises and conflict intensifies, the village stands at a decisive moment where courage must overcome the shadows of the past.

After losing his job in the aftermath of the earthquake, Kazumasa drifts into petty crime until a mysterious stray dog named Tamon leads him and his struggling family toward emotional renewal. When Tamon suddenly disappears, Kazumasa traces him to Miwa, a young woman facing her own hardships. As they uncover the truth behind the dog's journey, they form an unlikely alliance and vow to help Tamon reach the person he has been searching for all along.

Tarzan saves a group of children who have been kidnapped after their school bus breaks down. The adventure takes an unexpected turn when the children later get the chance to return the favor and save him.

t: Angry Squad: The Civil Servent and the Seven Swind
d: After being duped by the smooth-talking Himuro, rigid civil servant Kumazawa prepares for retaliation-until the con man proposes an unlikely alliance. Their target: Tachibana, Japan's most formidable tax evader. With a motley crew and a razor-sharp plan, the "Angry Squad" sets out to expose his billion-yen hoard. A nimble, stylish caper that turns financial justice into irresistible entertainment.

After Ramabai's death, Babasaheb Ambedkar found steady support in Dr. Sharda Kabir later Maisaheb Savita Ambedkar who cared for him through his most demanding years. Following his passing, false accusations pushed her into seclusion, until activists revived her public life. She returned with purpose, championing social justice and Buddhist rights until her final days.

Puja, a college girl, accidentally connects with Omm during a phone competition, and their bond quickly grows. Omm is set to marry Bhakti under certain family conditions, but unforeseen events force him to marry Puja instead. Though he promises Bhakti he'll divorce Puja in six months, he gradually falls in love with her. Realising his emotional conflict, Bhakti steps back and helps reunite them, bringing the story to a heartfelt and hopeful conclusion.

A dedicated soldier`s life changes forever when he loses his legs in a fierce battle while protecting the nation. As he fights his way back from pain to purpose, his love for Shishira becomes his emotional anchor, while his grandmother Nagamma`s unwavering strength keeps him going. His resilience turns him into a national hero, ultimately earning the Vir Chakra and inspiring everyone around him.
A powerful media mogul becomes the target of a ruthless hacker, pulling him into a deadly game where his reputation, fortune and family are on the line.

Once a celebrated prime-time anchor, Shinnosuke Orimoto is demoted to a late-night radio slot after an abrupt and unexplained exit from television. When a mysterious caller warns him of an impending bomb attack, he seizes the moment as a chance to reclaim his former stature. But what begins as a desperate bid for relevance quickly escalates into a volatile live negotiation, forcing Orimoto to navigate a deadly game where every word and every second could trigger catastrophe.

The story of Namsang and Hangma centers on their married life, which is deeply intertwined with Limbu culture. Their journey involves confronting entrenched traditions and personal struggles, all set against the backdrop and rhythmic heartbeat of the sacred Chyabrung drum.

In a quiet Konkan village, Kaveri lives a sheltered life until she marries Akash, an ambitious local boy who takes her to the city. Overwhelmed but eager to adapt, she builds a simple, loving routine. But when Akash suddenly disappears one morning and doesn't return, Kaveri, alone and inexperienced, must summon the courage to navigate the unfamiliar city and search for her missing husband.

A young girl from a Gurukula becomes fascinated by the lotus and sets out to understand its deep roots in Indian life. Her journey explores the flower's presence across art, culture, scriptures, science, medicine, spirituality, and history. From ancient epics to modern honours, she discovers how the lotus remains a powerful symbol woven into every layer of India's traditions. Padmagandhi blends knowledge and storytelling as it follows her quest to uncover the timeless significance of this sacred bloom.

A seemingly ordinary 10 note used in a hawala transaction goes missing after an unexpected accident. What starts as a simple search spirals into chaos as multiple people chase the same note, each driven by greed, secrets and hidden agendas. As the hunt intensifies, the note exposes betrayals, dark pasts, shifting alliances and dangerous confrontations, revealing every characters true colours.

Two decades after Tatya burns a man alive, the past resurfaces when Siddharth defeats him in the local elections. During his felicitation, memories of that violent chapter return as Siddharth and Vaishali make their way back to the village, setting the stage for long-buried truths to confront the present.

Inspired by the real life of Datha Chakravarthy, a 75-year-old who lived in 1970s Malaysia, the film traces his struggles, triumphs, and enduring legacy. Made with his family's consent, it blends authenticity with scale, shot largely in Malaysia and partly in Tamil Nadu. A compelling portrait of resilience, identity, and unwavering determination.

Vijay, a ninth-grader from a small village, dreams big and idolizes Amitabh Bachchan. But born into a lower-caste family, he feels ashamed of his father's work as a toilet cleaner and faces constant ridicule from the villagers. His story follows a young boy's awakening as he confronts humiliation, corruption, and casteism, determined to rise above the labels forced on him.
A character-driven story about an individual named Peter who battles alcoholism and embarks on a journey to recovery.

In this lively mix of action, comedy and emotion, Vamsi finds himself juggling family conflicts and an unexpected romance with Siri. As hidden ties and old rivalries resurface, tensions rise between the families. Caught in the chaos, Vamsi works to protect his loved ones and restore harmony before everything spirals out of control.
In the battle between love and lust, a tribal man fights to save his deaf and mute girlfriend from a ruthless forest officer, unravelling a cat-and-mouse drama within the heart of the forest.
A faceless nobody unleashes statewide chaos to carve his identity, fueled by vengeance and a haunting past. As his power rises, the system launches an all-out war to stop the storm he has become.
Dhamilo Pahad is a Nepali movie starring Saughat Malla, Anisha Rasaily and Mahindra Bagdas in prominent roles. It is directed by John Rai.

Bijli, a wandering Banjaran, survives life's harsh realities on the road with only her dog by her side. But is she really who she claims to be? As shadows from her past begin to surface, the truth she's hiding threatens to upend not just her own life, but everyone else's as well.
An enigmatic con man recruits a group of three people to swap a dead body from a specific grave. But disputes arise when the recruited team realizes that the job is not what it seems to be.

The story revolves around a son who, in an unexpected turn of events, decides to arrange a marriage for his father in order to fulfil the demands of his potential better half's family, who insist on having a woman in the household.

Sub-Inspector Ramki's sudden disappearance draws ACP Anand into a maze involving Shilpa and her affluent husband, Virat. A staged accident, an empty house, and a hidden gun deepen the mystery, while conflicting accounts raise new doubts. As Virat's past and Missira's death resurface, a buried truth binds all four edges closer to exposure.
Two Cup Tea is a Gujarati movie starring Jignesh Modi, Vidhi Shah and Naisarg Mistry in prominent roles.
A young man's troubled marriage takes an unexpected turn when his bride stays with her in-laws for six months, uncovering buried secrets that upend the family and change everything.
The film explores family values, woven with romance, action, and socially relevant themes.

Krishna deeply falls in love with Kavya but also has a relationship with Drushya where he does not remember Drushya due to a chromophobic issue. Can he manage both relationships using our Indian scriptures and ancient sciences?

Nestled in the hills, Chinna Malai is a serene village haunted by a brutal ritual where a virgin girl is sacrificed every full moon. When six visual communication students arrive to shoot a short film, tragedy strikes as one of them becomes the latest victim. As fear grips the village, the remaining students join forces with a police officer to uncover the truth behind the ritual, racing to expose the dark force that controls Chinna Malai.

Malti, a devoted wife, mother and Asha worker, risks everything when her community needs her. Joined by an elderly boss lady, a drunk troublemaker and a clueless friend, she navigates a chaotic mission that proves real heroes can come from the most ordinary places. Rinku Rajguru shines in this heartfelt tale of courage and sisterhood.

Having a miserable past of being evacuated from their homeland and losing their livelihood, Rokkapuli and Pandi are among the main people of the village who aspire to become millionaires by peddling ganja (marijuana). Can they successfully achieve their dream?

When Harishchandra`s demand for a motorcycle as a dowry spins out of control, a chain of hilarious chaos begins! Between love, ego, and unexpected twists, Motorcycle is a full-on family comedy that rides through laughter, emotions, and a heartfelt message.
A woman is abandoned, deceived, and wounded, but she rises again with pride. Saayavanam traces Sita's journey from pain to power, from silence to strength.

A village dreamer, Shiva comes to Hyderabad to become a director. Rejected and broke, he enters the drug mafia to fund his film, rising quickly but losing himself to violence. Hunted by the police and betrayed by gangsters, he makes one final move to fight back.

Four friends heading to an exam encounter a sinister presence near a pond, triggering a mysterious crash that leaves them in a coma. Convinced it's no ordinary accident, Bashar's uncle seeks help from a Maulvi, who must uncover the dark force binding the boys between life and death.

Haunted by an unresolved past, a drifting young man finds himself at a crossroads where ambition, memory, and human connection collide. As unexpected encounters reshape his worldview, he is forced to confront who he has been and decide who he is willing to become.
The lives of some elderly men turn tragic when sucked into the vortex of memory and desire, just like the youngsters, consumed by passion.

Three heartbroken men survive a fatal bus crash thanks to Koyal, only to later save her from suicide. Learning her lover was framed, they successfully expose the real villain and reunite the couple. Through this shared mission and newfound friendship, the three men also begin to heal their own emotional wounds.
Abhay Sinh Rathod is a fearless and unconventional college professor who believes that real education begins beyond textbooks.

The Gujarati film Raja Saheb is inspired by the popular play Hukam Malik, written by Shri Chinu Modi. It tells the story of a poor villager, Hariya, whose dream of becoming a king is granted by a genie. Once inside the grand palace, with certain conditions, Hariya`s life as a king takes dramatic turns and leads to important realizations.
A forgotten love story inspired by a true incident in Salem in 2009, following a young couple who elope against their families' wishes, only to return later and face the consequences of their choice.

A duty-bound constable is tasked with escorting a murder suspect from prison to court, but the journey becomes far more than a routine transfer. As unexpected events unfold, hidden truths come to light, exposing systemic flaws, deep-rooted religious prejudice, and the prisoner's painful past shaped by love, loss, and injustice, ultimately challenging everything the constable believes in.

Rohan, a young Gujarati dreamer in Los Angeles juggles odd jobs, shady hustles, and unexpected romance while chasing his elusive green card-until love and secrets collide in this hilarious and heartwarming dramedy about ambition, family, and second chances.

A soulful musical romance that traces the emotional journey of two young lovers from different social backgrounds. As they navigate societal stigma and personal challenges, they discover the healing power of love through music.
Four friends set out to challenge blind beliefs, only to be drawn into a mysterious spiritual encounter that changes their lives forever.
Four conservative girls sneak away on a secret trip, but what starts as fun soon turns into an unexpected adventure that tests their courage, friendship, and beliefs.

t: Tu Meri Main Tera Main Tera Tu Meri
d: Two souls find love in the midst of self-discovery, but family expectations test their bond, leaving them with only hope for a reunion.
Raw, rooted drama where humour and heart collide with hard truths. Born from the soil, it beats to the rhythm of resistance, humanity, and hope.

45 is a gripping tale of life, love, and destiny, filled with raw emotions, intense drama, and high-octane action. The film features breathtaking visual effects, amplified by an Oscar-winning team from Hollywood.
Paruthi is a Tamil movie starring Sonia Agarwal in a prominent role. It is directed by A Guru.

The film revolves around the lives of three close friends who live in a typical Mumbai chawl. Circumstances and events push the trio into a challenging situation, leading them into a kidnapping plot. Adding to the chaos of their misadventure, a formidable fugitive gangster unexpectedly returns to Mumbai.

Lawho Gouranger Naam Rey intertwines three timelines from Mahaprabhu`s divine era to colonial theatre and a modern film set. A soulful exploration of faith, love, and the eternal mystery of the saint`s disappearance.
A group of friends is going through a mid-life crisis. They decide to remake a favourite movie from their youth, but encounter unexpected events when they enter the jungle.

t: Mission Santa: Yoyo to the Rescue
d: Mission Santa: Yoyo to the Rescue is a pulse-pounding, laugh-out-loud animated adventure where Santa teams up with daring kids to save Christmas from the ultimate naughty nemesis!
Dhanesh Ke Aradhna is a Chhattisgarhi movie starring Dhanesh Sahu and Aradhana Sahu in prominent roles. It is directed by Pranav Jha.

Ajay Markandaya, a suspended police officer, rises against antisocial elements, gangsters, and corrupt politicians. When a critical situation unfolds, he must confront these forces to restore justice and ensure a better future for the state and its people.
In pre-independence Secunderabad, Michael, a gifted footballer chasing his London dream, gets entangled in an unexpected turn that changes the course of his life.
Joy lives in London with his daughter. He wants his parents to stay with them in London, but his father, Gaur Babu, who runs a hotel in Kolkata, refuses to go to London and then what next?
Two best friends, one kite, and a clash between love and loyalty.

Malpe Upendra lives by a fierce moral code, while Kali thrives in chaos and power. When fate forces their worlds to intersect, their clash becomes more than just a fight, it turns into a battle of principles, betrayal, and survival. As hidden motives surface and loyalties break, both men are pushed to confront who they truly are, leading to a gripping showdown where truth, identity, and justice collide.

Surrounded by 2,500 restless dreamers, friendships, and festival-filled chaos, Suraj steps into college as a beloved teacher. But when a crisis threatens everything, he becomes their unexpected saviour, until the true reason behind his arrival slowly unfolds.

When a meteor crashes into the highly superstitious village of Shambhala in the 1980s, strange supernatural events unfold, forcing an atheist scientist to face an ancient horror - one that science can`t explain or escape.

A young Hindu priest`s life turns upside down when he encounters a ghost. What begins as an unexpected problem soon becomes a journey that challenges his beliefs, his purpose, and everything he thought was real.

When a meteor crashes into the highly superstitious village of Shambhala in the 1980s, strange supernatural events unfold, forcing an atheist scientist to face an ancient horror - one that science can`t explain or escape.

Joe, a talented but insecure Goan Tiatr artist, finally gets a chance to perform when the shows lead actor is fired after a scandal. Soon after, a chain of comic chaos begins with misunderstandings, a mistaken kidnapping, and a drunk organiser presumed dead, dragging everyone to the theatre on the night of the grand 100th show.

In the midst of all the madness, Joe is pushed onto the stage. He battles his fear, embraces the moment, wins the audience, and transforms what could have been a disaster into an unforgettable success.

As time changes and people become consumed by the internet, human relationships drift apart, yet loyalty and honesty still endure. In this era, the film Savitri Kalyugatli explores the timeless test of truth and sacrifice, following the journey of Aditya Deshmukh, a successful businessman whose life takes a dramatic turn due to unforeseen circumstances, and his wife Savitri, who stands by him, raising the question of whether true love and values can survive in today`s world.

t: Lost in Fear, The House of Dead, Tomb of Pharaoh 1 (7D)
d: If you are a representative of the production house, please share the details of the film with synopsis@bookmyshow.com

t: Lost in Fear, Ride in the Mines, Tomb of Pharaoh 1 (7D)
d: Thrilling immersive experiences that plunge audiences into a world of fear, underground danger, and ancient Egyptian mysteries.

t: Prehistoric Adventure 7D, Scary House, Polar Roller Coaster (7D)
d: Immersive 7D experiences that take audiences through prehistoric worlds, haunted horrors, and icy high-speed thrills.

t: Roller Coaster 2, Terrific Dinosaurs, Adventure of an Iceberg (7D)
d: A fun-filled adventure that brings prehistoric giants to life, celebrating curiosity, discovery, and imagination.

Ladhei is a haunting tale of love, rebellion, and fate set against the restless sea. When five fugitives flee a broken system, they spark a storm where justice and vengeance collide. Amidst the chaos, a silent, fragile love blooms and fades, as loyalty and sacrifice are pushed to their limits.

Vrusshabha is a high on storytelling epic that explores the deep and unshakable bond between a father and son, a bond that faces an unexpected test. Spanning two worlds and timelines from the grandeur of a historic kingdom to the intensity of the modern era, the film takes audiences on a powerful journey of love, sacrifice, and destiny.

Blending heart-stirring drama with breathtaking action, soul-stirring music, and stunning visuals, Vrusshabha is crafted to be an unforgettable big-screen experience. With Mohanlal portraying a king for the very first time in a bilingual epic, this film promises to leave a lasting impact long after the credits roll.
God of Masses Nandamuri Balakrishna, Blockbuster Maker Boyapati Sreenu, Raam Achanta, Gopi Achanta, 14 Reels Plus, M Tejaswini Nandamuri Presents Akhanda 2: Thaandavam

Re-releasing on 9th January 2026

Mohan Sharma's search for true love goes haywire when every attempt to marry Saniya Mirza ends with him accidentally marrying someone else. In a string of comic twists, he ends up with three wives from three different faiths Hindu, Muslim, and Christian; struggles to balance their expectations while keeping his triple life a secret.

Just when he thinks he has adjusted to the chaos, Saniya returns as Simran, a Sikh woman, forcing Mohan to confront the mess he created. Now he must untangle his marriages and prove his love to Simran before his world collapses again.

Dhurandhar is a genre-bending, edge-of-the-seat action thriller with big stars playing iconic characters. Told with audacious swagger, the story follows a mysterious "traveller" as he slips into the heart of Karachi's underbelly and rises through its ranks with lethal precision, only to tear the notorious ISI-Underworld nexus apart from within.

Get ready to race back into the wild, colorful world of Zootopia, where animals talk, hustle, and chase their dreams - just like us!

Whether you loved the first Zootopia or are diving in for the first time, this is one ride you don't want to miss!

Starry-eyed, energetic, and has all the love for his hero. Sagar is one of us.

A biopic of a fan.

Khaidu is a suspense drama follows four characters whose shifting relationships push them into intense, emotional decisions. As tensions rise, the story explores how powerful emotions can drive people to extreme actions. In the end, the film reinforces one truth: human values still endure.

A young man working in a private company falls in love with a girl who is searching for a job. Their relationship is disrupted when he clashes with a local goon who attacks his uncle. Hurt and disappointed, the girl distances herself from him, pushing him into deep despair.

When he tries to end his life, he is stopped by a ghost who once committed suicide. What follows is a journey that reminds him why every life is worth fighting for.

Aavaa De tells the story of Jaymeen, a Europe-raised musician with Gujarati roots, and Jahnvi, a driven young woman from a small town who works to uplift local talent. Their chaotic first meetings slowly turn into a genuine friendship, and love quietly begins to grow between them.

Jahnvi recognises her feelings early on, but Jaymeen remains hesitant, unsure about responsibility and commitment. As their bond deepens, both are pushed to confront what love truly means and whether they are ready to fight for it in this musical journey of emotion and self-discovery.

In November 1943, the Fascists bring another group of Soviet orphans to Vyritsa, where an "orphanage" has been set up in a former pioneer camp. The conditions are inhumane cold, hunger, forced labour, punishment cells for disobedience, and even shootings for escape attempts. Worst of all, the children are used as blood donors for wounded German soldiers.

Despite the horror surrounding them, the young prisoners come together, find courage, and decide to attempt an escape.

t: Two People in One Life and Dog
d:
The film tells the story of two elderly intellectuals-a husband and wife-living in Saint Petersburg, Russia. They both experienced World War II as children. Now, they are lonely, as their children have moved abroad. This film is about the wisdom, optimism, calmness, patience, and forgiveness of these two elderly individuals. It portrays their love for each other and for life.

These qualities are often lacking in today's world, especially among the younger generation. That is why these elderly people, along with the warmth of their home, attract those who feel cold and are in need of help and support.

Teenager Phil Dino is not having the greatest time of his life. His schoolmates tease him, his crush ignores him, and his dream of becoming a veterinarian shatters against the Dino family's occupational tradition: he is expected to become a palaeontologist. Phil's life changes drastically when he accidentally opens a portal to the Mesozoic Era.

Now he has to learn to survive in a prehistoric jungle teeming with danger, and to avoid becoming a snack for hungry dinosaurs. Most importantly, he must find common ground with his father so they can prevent a disaster from happening: a giant ancient serpent, Megaloboa, who has hated the Dino family for generations, is out to get them.

A film that captures the beauty and chaos of Mumbai, where every story lands and every second counts!

Experience Mumbai in its truest form like never before rushing, struggling, living, breathing, enjoying, and dancing to the rhythms of its relentless spirit. Through intersecting lives over a single day, the film celebrates the city, the kindness of strangers, its refusal to quit, and its quiet promise that tomorrow can be better.

The city is waiting. Are you ready for the ride?

Four mischievous students enrolled in the prestigious but extremely strict Liberty Engineering College. The college is known for its rigorous rules and a no-nonsense principal, who keeps a close eye on all activities. Their world takes an unexpected turn when they accidentally cross paths with a notorious gangster. He disguises himself as a motivational speaker and infiltrates the college with his hidden agenda.

Whenever evil rises in the world, the divine always incarnates to destroy it. This is a story of the triumph of righteousness over unrighteousness set in today's times.

The narrative centers on Babuli Mestry, an aging performer of Dashavatar, a traditional folk theatre form from the Konkan region that blends mythology, music, dance, and dialogue. When his life is struck by an unexpected storm, he struggles to endure, finding that the wisdom and spirit of Dashavatar light his path forward. Celebrating Marathi culture on a grand scale, the film blends mythology and the magic of Konkan's folk theatre to tell a deeply human story of belief, resilience, and faith.

You met the Sitaare.

Now meet the reason they shine.

The biggest film in the world, the ultimate cinematic experience and spectacle, goes even bigger with Avatar: Fire and Ash. In the aftermath of great loss, Jake Sully and Neytiri confront a new and dangerous force on Pandora. As tensions rise, their family`s strength and unity are tested like never before.

The films protagonist, Makhtumkuli Fragi, is a historical figure, a great Turkmen poet and thinker. Makhtumkuli lived and wrote in the mid-18th century. This film reflects the years the great poet spent in Uzbekistan, particularly his studies at the Kukeldash Madrasah in Bukhara and the Shergozi Khan Madrasah in Khiva, as well as the most important events of his life. Despite his youth, Makhtumkulis poetry became famous not only among the Turkmen but also the Uzbek people.

The film depicts Makhtumkulis attitude toward life and people, his high moral character, his inner experiences, suffering and pain, and his desire for a profound study of both religious and secular sciences. It also reveals his friendliness, his desire for the unity of his people, and his immense love for his homeland. The film was shot for the 300th anniversary of the birth of the great poet Makhtumkuli Fragi by the joint efforts of filmmakers from Uzbekistan and Turkmenistan.

August 1944. Deep in the forests of Western Belarus. The region recently liberated has become a special zone where enemy sabotage and intelligence units, left behind Soviet lines, are still operating. The Red Army is crossing the state border, and the war is turning back in their favour. But a strike from behind could disrupt the advance. Only the SMERSH counterintelligence officers can prevent the attack.

Maanbumigu Parai confronts the continuing injustice of untouchability within the world of music. The ancient Indian drum, the Parai, symbolises both rich cultural heritage and caste-based oppression, as only those deemed "untouchable" are allowed to play it, reinforcing their marginalisation.

Challenging this divide, the story envisions a future where music transcends caste, becoming truly universal. It questions whether equality and freedom in music have been achieved or if the struggle continues.

In Sundarpur, tyrant Sarpanch Sungraam Singh enforces a cruel tradition that costs innocent lives. When Gopal and his wife Mohini resist, they are killed, but Mohini's vengeful spirit returns to punish the guilty. With a priest's guidance, she finds peace, and justice is served.
Charles Dickens`s A Christmas Carol is transformed into a joyous, colorful, feel-good Christmas musical that celebrates modern-day London and all of its communities and cultures.

Young survivor of the siege Yura Tyukalov came to sports after the war, when it seemed he had no strength to live, let alone to conduct grueling training in academic rowing. But after meeting coaches Mikhail and Vera Savrimovich, Yura gets a second wind and starts life anew.

Fates, burned by the war, unite in a team where everyone supports and inspires each other. Victories are not easy, but Yura has love, talent and a native team that is unstoppable: their goal is the Olympics in Helsinki.

"Deep Fridge" explores the aftermath of divorce for Swarnava and Mili, who were victims of the myth of a "perfectly happy marriage." The film focuses on their struggle to achieve closure and build separate, guilt-free futures that are fair to their only child, Tatai.

He is crazy... he is cute... he is adorable and he is everyone`s bestie...

Stitch is here to bring the house down with his infectious energy.

Nanda Master'nka Chatasali showcases the extraordinary life of late Shri Nanda Prusty, a humble village teacher who offered free education for over 70 years. From his early shift from acting to teaching to preserving Odisha's traditional Chatasali system, his journey shaped three generations with discipline, simplicity, and service. Honoured with the Padma Shri at 103, his legacy continues to inspire long after his passing.

Mansi, an architect haunted by nightmares of a brutal murder in a mysterious haveli, falls in love with industrialist Aditya Deshmukh as they collaborate for a prestigious project in Nainital. When she discovers the haveli from her dreams is real, dark secrets from the past threaten to destroy their present, forcing her to choose between love and a terrifying truth.
A retired policeman takes on a disguise to meet his long-lost love. What happens when two ex-lovers meet after decades, and how life unfolds for the two, form the narrative of the story.

A frantic wife seeks Mitin's help when her husband goes missing. What starts as a simple disappearance soon unravels into a murder investigation. As Mitin digs deeper, hidden motives, buried secrets and a widening circle of suspects come to light.

With twists at every turn, Mitin: Ekti Khunir Sandhaney unfolds as a gripping, edge-of-the-seat mystery in the third instalment of the franchise.

Years ago Joseph, a chit fund owner, disappeared and left his family in disgrace. His son Abi took the blame for a crime he never committed and returns from prison determined to rebuild his life. As he works at the harbor and earns respect, he comes into conflict with Babu and his brothers who control the coastal underworld.

When betrayal and loss push him to the edge, Abi sets out to uncover the truth behind his father's disappearance and fight for his own destiny.
