Yamla is an emotional journey of self-discovery, love, and resilient tradition. It tells the story of a young man torn between his fathers empire and his own heartbeat, music. Set in the soulful lanes of Amritsar, the film captures the clash between tradition and ambition, wealth and art, pride and passion.

It offers a moving cinematic experience filled with music, love, heartbreak, and redemption, a universal story told through the fragrance of Punjab and the power of melody.

t: Hind Di Chadar - Guru Ladho Re
d:
In 1664, Sri Guru Tegh Bahadur ji was anointed as the Ninth Light of Guru Nanak. At the time, Emperor Aurangzeb ruled India and sought to forcibly convert the nation into Dar-ul-Islam. The oppressed Brahmins, led by Kripa Ram, turned to Guru Tegh Bahadur ji for help. Moved by their plight, the Guru agreed to represent their cause, accompanied by his devoted disciples Bhai Mati Das, Bhai Dayal Das and Bhai Sati Das.

What followed became a turning point in Indian history, a timeless symbol of dharma, truth, the defence of religious freedom and human rights.

Vaibhav Rajadhyaksh, a carefree UK photographer, meets Anagha Deshpande, a strong-willed divorcee, while shooting her travel agency's campaign. His charm draws her in, but his fear of commitment pushes her away.

With love and support from her family and childhood friend Kunal, Vaibhav realizes his mistakes and confesses his feelings. Now, Anagha must decide if she can trust his transformation and give love another chance.

Roman Mukhin, an employee at a major steel company, is urged by his management to adopt a child to advance his career. Hoping it will also mend their strained marriage, he and his wife choose 11-year-old Marta, a quiet, determined girl who dreams of visiting India.

Though hesitant to leave her hometown and her grandmother, Marta agrees after receiving her grandmother's blessing. It feels like the beginning of a hopeful new chapter.

Jude Marimuthu, a secretive man working night shifts at an IT company, has loved his relative Annie Mary since childhood. Arokiya Raj starts looking for an alliance for Annie and informs his sister Stella, Jude's mother. The next day, Arokiya Raj dies in an accident.

At the mortuary, everyone is exhausted, and his body goes missing. Inspector Chakaravarthy, Arokiya Raj's close friend, begins investigating to find the missing corpse.

Amidst a symphony of raindrops, Sanal departs from Cochin Airport, traversing the mystical, rugged landscapes of Idukki to embrace his lifelong, cherished dream with Leena.

As they travel along winding roads, their hearts dance through a tapestry of memories, joyful, sorrowful, tender, and enduring, woven with threads of love and longing.

In the valley of Manipur, Boong, a little boy, plans to surprise his mother with a special gift. Innocently believing that bringing back his absentee father would make her happiest, he sets out in search of him. The journey shatters his world but ultimately leads to an unexpected gift.

Boong became the first Indian film to win the BAFTA Award in the Children's & Family Film category.

This heartfelt family drama beautifully captures the struggles of a joint family as the new generation slowly drifts away from their roots. Through its emotional narrative, the film explores how our values and relationships are our greatest treasures, reminding us that no matter how far we fly, it is our family that always keeps us grounded.

t: Hari Hara Veera Mallu - Part 1 Sword vs Spirit
d: Veera Mallu, a fearless warrior shaped by the hardships of his early life, emerges as the first Indian to rise against the oppressive Mughal empire. Driven by a burning desire for justice, he embarks on a daring mission to confront the ruthless actions of the army generals, igniting a revolutionary spark that could change the course of history.

Meet Bachu Bapodara, a health freak, master miser, and widower who`s turned saving money into a life mission. But when his fed-up family sends him on a "free" vacation to Bangkok, life takes a hilarious U-turn. This adventure turns into a heartwarming rollercoaster when Bachu meets a vibrant, mysterious lady. From beach parties and parasailing to scandals and confessions, this trip forces Bachu to introspect.

"Bachu ni Benpani" is a laugh-out-loud Gujarati film packed with emotional moments that make it perfect for the whole family!

In his signature style, James Gunn takes on the original superhero in the newly imagined DC universe with a singular blend of epic action,
humor and heart, delivering a Superman who`s driven by compassion and an inherent belief in_ the goodness of humankind.

There are at least 10 known health benefits of `Gulkand` (Rose-Petal Jam). This film is about the 11th and perhaps the most important benefit - Happiness! A film as sweet, fragrant & healthy as the condiment itself. Nostalgia re-creates relationship drama like no other emotion. When young lovers unite - the whole world conspires to challenge them at every step...but what happens when `older-lovers` re-unite? Gulkand is one such rosy sweet story that celebrates the innocence, the high-strung emotions, the melodrama, the sweetness and the tragic-comedy nature of the perpetual global pandemic - love!

Our favourite mouth-freshener now comes in an age-proof, `cinematic mind-freshener` form - on the 1st of May, 2025!

Malhar, a young rickshaw driver burdened by family responsibilities, feels isolated from his peers. His life changes forever when he accidentally discovers Argentine Tango. He and his younger sister, Rani, begin to practice in secret, as Malhar finds himself torn between his conservative roots and the elite dance world. As he delves deeper into this art form, he uncovers profound connections that awaken a vibrant life beyond his mundane existence.

Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed vacation to the small tourist town of Plummerville. However, he soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a corrupt theme-park operator, a shady sheriff, and a bloodthirsty crime boss.
